segments.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective
质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective
医创建科技（深圳）有限公司MediConcepts Technology (Shenzhen) Company Ltd.

blocks.text: 2.0 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: 质量方针Quality Policy
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: 医科创建集团致力于成为国际顶级供应商，提供高品质，价格合理的器械，辅助外科医生改善病人的 生活素质和针对用户的需求，提供崭新的工程技术方案。
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: MediConcepts Group’s vision is to be the world’s leading supplier of high quality, cost effective instrumentation, empowering surgeons to provide the patients with an improved quality of life, and to create engineering solutions which truly focus on the user’s needs.
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: 我们承诺致力持续改进我们的医疗器械质量管理体系及提供足够资源，以确保提供完善之服务及满足 客户及法规的要求。我们并以客户之信任及满足作为我们最根本的表现基础。
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: We strive to continuously improve our processes and resources. We proudly pronounce our commitment to understanding, and meeting customer expectations and regulatory requirements at all times. We take customer satisfaction as the primary measure of our performance.
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: 质量目标QUALITY OBJECTIVE
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: 我们的质量目标是经与我们员工沟通，并依管理层所定之质量方针，以及质量手册所规定的质量体系 要求而制定。具体的质量目标是通过管理评审会议制定
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: The specified quality objectives are set by the management review meeting and it is our goal that a captioned policy is communicated to all our employees, who will adhere to the spirit of this Quality Policy as well as the quality system requirements set forth in the Quality Manual.
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: 质量目标参照《质量目标一览表》
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: Quality Objective refers to <Quality Objectives List>
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: 质量方针和质量目标将通过以下途径达成：
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: The quality policy and objective will be achieved through the following channels: 领导所有员工去建立并维持一个符合0.4.1 所列的标准要求的质量管理体系，满足0.4.2 所列的适用 的法规要求。
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: Lead all staff to establish and maintain a quality management system in compliance with the requirements stated in section 0.41. The quality management system shall fulfill all relevant regulation requirement.
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: 1) 实施医疗器械国际标准;
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: Implement the international standards for medical devices; 2) 通过对过程和设备的确认和验证以确保产品在每一个制作过程中之质量﹔
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: Ensure the product quality in every manufacturing process through validation and verification of the manufacturing processes and equipments; 3) 通过培训所有员工以确保产品质量和效能改进。
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: Ensure the product quality and improve efficiency by providing training to all staff.
blocks.section_title: 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

blocks.text: 3.2.2.1 负责各部门运作之整体管理，并有对整体运作之责任及权力。

blocks.text: Be responsible for the overall management of the operations of each department Having responsibility and authority over the operations. 3.2.2.2 领导及管理公司各部门，使生产团队合作凝聚，以达致符合客户要求及公司 目标。

blocks.text: Provide leadership and management to the division, motivate all divisions and team members to work cohesively in meeting customer’s requirements and achieving company’s goals. 3.2.2.3 负责策划质量管理及建立公司质量目标。

p036_b0011 [4.1.1 | segment_0064]: The overall company processes of Quality Management System and their application throughout the organization are identified in Chapter 5, 6, 7 and 8.. 4.1.2 核心/主要过程的流程图在附录Ⅰ描述。
p036_b0012 [4.1.1 | segment_0064]: A Flow chart of the core/major processes is shown in Appendix I. 总经理协同各部门经理基于0.4.1 所列标准要求的风险的方法对各部门过程进行控制管理。
p036_b0013 [4.1.1 | segment_0064]: General manager and department mangers control and manage the processes in each department according to the requirement stated in section 0.4.1. 4.1.3 公司董事、总监及部门经理负责：
p036_b0014 [4.1.1 | segment_0064]: Company directors and department managers are responsible to: a) 确定所需的准则和方法，以确保这些过程的有效运行和控制；
p036_b0015 [4.1.1 | segment_0064]: Determine criteria and methods needed to ensure that both the operation and control of these processes are effective; b) 确保可获得必要的资源和信息，以支持这些过程的运行和对这些过程的监视；
p036_b0016 [4.1.1 | segment_0064]: Ensure the availability of resources and information necessary to support the operation and monitoring of these processes; c) 实施必要的措施，以实现这些过程策划的结果并保持这些过程的有效性；
p036_b0017 [4.1.1 | segment_0064]: Implement actions necessary to achieve planned results and maintain the effectiveness of these processes; d) 监视、测量（适当时）和分析这些过程；
p036_b0018 [4.1.1 | segment_0064]: Monitor, measure as appropriate, and analyse these processes; e) 建立和保持所需的记录以证实符合0.4.1 所列的标准并满足0.4.2 所列的适用法规要求。

block_text:
p038_b0018 [4.2.2 | segment_0069]: The Quality manager of the Group is responsible for establishing and maintaining this
p038_b0019 [4.2.2 | segment_0069]: Quality Manual; and this Quality Manual shall be approved by the Managing Director. The
p038_b0020 [4.2.2 | segment_0069]: aims of the Quality Manual are:- ▪ 记录质量管理体系质量方针、目标及范围
p038_b0021 [4.2.2 | segment_0069]: Document Quality Policy, Quality Objectives and define the scope of the Quality Management System. ▪ 定义本集团公司及其子公司的组织架构，及其职责、权限以及影响质量的各职能间的
p038_b0022 [4.2.2 | segment_0069]: 相互关系
p038_b0023 [4.2.2 | segment_0069]: Define the corporate structure of the Group and each subsidiary and their respective responsibilities, authority and interrelationships of the functions which may affect quality; ▪ 作为质量管理体系运作参考手册
p038_b0024 [4.2.2 | segment_0069]: Act as an operating reference manual for the Quality Management System. ▪ 描述过程关系
p038_b0025 [4.2.2 | segment_0069]: Describe the interaction between processes. ▪ 帮助改善质量管理体系
p038_b0026 [4.2.2 | segment_0069]: Assist in improving the Quality Management System. 本质量管理体系文件结构如下：
p038_b0027 [4.2.2 | segment_0069]: The structure of the documentation used in this Quality Management System is shown below: ▪ Level 1 质量手册Quality Manual ▪ Level 2 质量管理体系程序Quality Management System Procedures

p039_b0007 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: 4.2.3 医疗器械文档 Medical Device Document 就每一款式、型号及系列的医疗器械，建立和维护一个包含或识别产品的规格及质量管 理体系的要求之技术文件/产品档案。这些文件包括以下信息：
p039_b0008 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: For each type, model, and family of medical devices, a technical file or product file either containing or identifying documents defining product specifications and Quality Management System requirements is established and maintained (see 4.2.4). These documents include, or refer to the locations of the following information:
p039_b0009 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: ◼ 医疗器械的概述、预期用途/预期目的和标记，包括所有适用说明；
p039_b0010 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: General description of the medical device, intended use/purpose, and labelling, including any instructions for use;
p039_b0011 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: ◼ 产品规范；
p039_b0012 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: Specifications for product;
p039_b0013 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: ◼ 制造、包装、贮存、处置和流通的规范或程序；
p039_b0014 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: Specifications or procedures for manufacturing, packaging, storage, handling and distribution;
p039_b0015 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: ◼ 测量和监视程序；
p039_b0016 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: Procedures for measuring and monitoring;
p039_b0017 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: ◼ 臨床評價文件；
p039_b0018 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: Clinical evaluation documentation;
p039_b0019 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: ◼ 上市後監督文件；
p039_b0020 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: PMS documentations ;
p039_b0021 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: 文件的最新電子檔或紙檔需要在已上市的市場上保留，以便根據要求提供給任何監管 機構。對於歐盟，位於歐洲經濟區以外的製造商將在其歐洲授權代表提供。詳情請參 閱 QSP0723 – 監管策略。
p039_b0022 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: An up-to-date electronic or hard copy of the file needs to be kept available in launched market, allowing it to be presented to any Regulatory Authorities upon request. For EU, manufacturers based outside the EEA are to make it available at the address of their European Authorized Representative. For the details, please refer to QSP0723 – Regulatory Strategy.
p039_b0023 [4.2.3 | segment_0071]: 现时，本集团公司所生产的医疗器械产品、配件并没有特定安装和服务要求，也没有生 产有源植入性医疗器械和植入性医疗器械，故此，质量管理体系不适用于条款7.5.3、 7.5.4、和 7.5.9.2。

blocks.text: At least one copy of obsolete controlled documents shall be retained. The period which this obsolete controlled document to be retained shall be documented and recorded in a procedure. This period ensures that the documents to which medical devices have been manufactured and tested are available for at least the lifetime of the medical device, but shall not be less than the retention period of any resulting record (see 4.2.5), or as specified by relevant regulatory requirements. The master copies of all superseded documents are retained in accordance with QSP0401.
blocks.section_title: 文件控制Control of documents 制定形成文件的程序，以规定所需要的控制。

blocks.text: 4.2.5 记录控制Control of records
blocks.section_title: 记录控制Control of records

blocks.text: 集团公司应建立并维护记录，以提供符合质量管理体系要求和其有效运作的证据，记
blocks.section_title: 记录控制Control of records

blocks.text: 录应保持清晰，易于识别和检索。应编制形成文件的程序，以规定记录的识别，储
blocks.section_title: 记录控制Control of records

blocks.text: 存，保护，检索，保存期限和处置所需的控制措施。
blocks.section_title: 记录控制Control of records

blocks.text: Records are established and maintained to provide evidence of conformity to requirements
blocks.section_title: 记录控制Control of records

blocks.text: and of the effective operation of the Quality Management System. The records that are
blocks.section_title: 记录控制Control of records

blocks.text: maintained in their respective departments must be legible, readily identifiable and
blocks.section_title: 记录控制Control of records

blocks.text: retrievable. A documented procedure shall be established to define the controls needed for
blocks.section_title: 记录控制Control of records

blocks.text: the identification, storage, protection, retrieval, retention time and disposition of records.
blocks.section_title: 记录控制Control of records

blocks.text: MC 不会收集保密健康信息。
blocks.section_title: 记录控制Control of records

blocks.text: No confidential health information shall be collected.
blocks.section_title: 记录控制Control of records

blocks.text: 记录被保存的期限应至少相当于该医疗器械的寿命期，但不少于从组织发放产品的日 期起计2 年，或按相关法规之要求规定。记录按QSP0401（文件及记录控制）规定保 存。
blocks.section_title: 记录控制Control of records

blocks.text: Records are retained for a period of time at least equivalent to the lifetime of the medical device, but not less than two years from the date of product released by the organization or as specified by relevant regulatory requirements. The records are retained in accordance with QSP0401 (Document and Record Control).
blocks.section_title: 记录控制Control of records

blocks.text: 5.0 管理职责Management responsibility
blocks.section_title: 管理职责Management responsibility

blocks.text: 5.1 管理承诺Management commitment
blocks.section_title: 管理承诺Management commitment

blocks.text: 最高管理者（指MediConcepts Group 的管理层，包括董事总经理、总经理、研发总监、业务开发总监、
blocks.section_title: 管理承诺Management commitment

blocks.text: 市场总监、品质经理、各部门经理）承诺建立、实施质量管理体系并持续改进其有效性，其承诺可通过
blocks.section_title: 管理承诺Management commitment

blocks.text: 以下方式证明：
blocks.section_title: 管理承诺Management commitment

blocks.text: Senior management (defined as the management of MediConcepts Group, includes the Managing Director,
blocks.section_title: 管理承诺Management commitment

blocks.text: General Manager, R&D Director, Business Development President, Marketing Director, Quality Manager and
blocks.section_title: 管理承诺Management commitment

blocks.text: Managers) is committed to the development and implementation of the Quality Management System and
blocks.section_title: 管理承诺Management commitment

blocks.text: continually improving its effectiveness, demonstrated by:
blocks.section_title: 管理承诺Management commitment

blocks.text: a) 向公司传达满足客户以及法规要求的重要性；
blocks.section_title: 管理承诺Management commitment

blocks.text: Communicating to the company the importance of meeting customer as well as applicable regulatory requirements; b) 制订质量方针；
blocks.section_title: 管理承诺Management commitment

blocks.text: Establishing the quality policy; c) 确保质量目标的制订；
blocks.section_title: 管理承诺Management commitment

blocks.text: Ensuring that quality objectives are established; d) 进行管理评审；及
blocks.section_title: 管理承诺Management commitment

blocks.text: Conducting management reviews; and e) 确保资源的可获得性。
blocks.section_title: 管理承诺Management commitment

p042_b0006 [5.0 | segment_0078]: 5.0 管理职责Management responsibility
p042_b0007 [5.1 | segment_0079]: 5.1 管理承诺Management commitment
p042_b0009 [5.1 | segment_0079]: 最高管理者（指MediConcepts Group 的管理层，包括董事总经理、总经理、研发总监、业务开发总监、
p042_b0010 [5.1 | segment_0079]: 市场总监、品质经理、各部门经理）承诺建立、实施质量管理体系并持续改进其有效性，其承诺可通过
p042_b0011 [5.1 | segment_0079]: 以下方式证明：
p042_b0012 [5.1 | segment_0079]: Senior management (defined as the management of MediConcepts Group, includes the Managing Director,
p042_b0013 [5.1 | segment_0079]: General Manager, R&D Director, Business Development President, Marketing Director, Quality Manager and
p042_b0014 [5.1 | segment_0079]: Managers) is committed to the development and implementation of the Quality Management System and
p042_b0015 [5.1 | segment_0079]: continually improving its effectiveness, demonstrated by:
p042_b0016 [5.1 | segment_0079]: a) 向公司传达满足客户以及法规要求的重要性；
p042_b0017 [5.1 | segment_0079]: Communicating to the company the importance of meeting customer as well as applicable regulatory requirements; b) 制订质量方针；
p042_b0018 [5.1 | segment_0079]: Establishing the quality policy; c) 确保质量目标的制订；
p042_b0019 [5.1 | segment_0079]: Ensuring that quality objectives are established; d) 进行管理评审；及
p042_b0020 [5.1 | segment_0079]: Conducting management reviews; and e) 确保资源的可获得性。

blocks.text: Ensuring the availability of resources.
blocks.section_title: 管理承诺Management commitment

blocks.text: 5.2 以顾客关注为焦点Customer focus
blocks.section_title: 以顾客关注为焦点Customer focus

blocks.text: 最高管理者负责确保顾客要求和适用的法律法规要求的重要性。
blocks.section_title: 以顾客关注为焦点Customer focus

blocks.text: Top management shall ensure that customer requirements and applicable regulatory requirements are determined and met.
blocks.section_title: 以顾客关注为焦点Customer focus

blocks.text: 5.3 质量方针Quality policy
blocks.section_title: 质量方针Quality policy

blocks.text: 最高管理者负责确保质量方针：
blocks.section_title: 质量方针Quality policy

blocks.text: Top management is responsible to ensure that the quality policy: a) 与集团公司的宗旨相适应；
blocks.section_title: 质量方针Quality policy

blocks.text: Matches the mission of the Group: b) 包含对满足要求和维持质量管理体系有效性的承诺；
blocks.section_title: 质量方针Quality policy

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第43页共83页
blocks.section_title: 质量方针Quality policy

blocks.text: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
blocks.section_title: 质量方针Quality policy

blocks.text: Includes a commitment to comply with requirements and to maintain the effectiveness of the Quality Management System: c) 提供制订和评审质量目标的框架；
blocks.section_title: 质量方针Quality policy

blocks.text: Provides a framework for establishing and reviewing quality objectives: d) 在集团公司内达至沟通和理解；和
blocks.section_title: 质量方针Quality policy

blocks.text: Is communicated and understood within the group: and e) 在持续合适性方面得到评审。
blocks.section_title: 质量方针Quality policy

blocks.text: Is reviewed for continuing suitability.
blocks.section_title: 质量方针Quality policy

blocks.text: 5.4 策划Planning
blocks.section_title: 策划Planning

blocks.text: 5.4.1 质量目标Quality Objective
blocks.section_title: 质量目标Quality Objective

blocks.text: 最高管理层负责确保在集团公司的相关职能和层次上建立质量目标，包括满足产品要求
blocks.section_title: 质量目标Quality Objective

blocks.text: 和适用的法规要求。质量目标应为可测量的并与质量方针保持一致。
blocks.section_title: 质量目标Quality Objective

blocks.text: Top management is responsible to ensure that quality objectives, including those needed to
blocks.section_title: 质量目标Quality Objective

blocks.text: meet applicable regulatory requirements and requirements for product, are established at
blocks.section_title: 质量目标Quality Objective

blocks.text: relevant functions and levels. The quality objectives are measurable and consistent with the
blocks.section_title: 质量目标Quality Objective

blocks.text: quality policy.
blocks.section_title: 质量目标Quality Objective

blocks.text: 5.4.2 质量管理体系策划Quality Management System planning
blocks.section_title: 质量管理体系策划Quality Management System planning

blocks.text: 最高管理者负责确保Top management is responsible to ensure that a) 以满足4.1 及质量目标的要求为目的进行质量管理体系策划。
blocks.section_title: 质量管理体系策划Quality Management System planning

blocks.text: The planning of the quality management system is carried out in order to meet the requirements given in 4.1, as well as the quality objectives; b) 在对质量管理体系的变更进行策划和实施时，质量管理体系的完整性得以维持。
blocks.section_title: 质量管理体系策划Quality Management System planning

blocks.text: The integrity of the Quality Management System is maintained when changes to the Quality Management System are planned and implemented.
blocks.section_title: 质量管理体系策划Quality Management System planning

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第44页共83页
blocks.section_title: 质量管理体系策划Quality Management System planning

blocks.text: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
blocks.section_title: 质量管理体系策划Quality Management System planning

blocks.text: 5.5 职责、权限和沟通Responsibility, authority and communication
blocks.section_title: 职责、权限和沟通Responsibility, authority and communication

blocks.text: 5.5.1 职责和权限Responsibility and authority
blocks.section_title: 职责和权限Responsibility and authority

blocks.text: 管理架构如公司的组织架构所示（见3.0），显示各相关职能间的相互关系及完成任务
blocks.section_title: 职责和权限Responsibility and authority

blocks.text: 所需的独立性和权限。
blocks.section_title: 职责和权限Responsibility and authority

blocks.text: The company organization charts (see 3.0) show the interrelationship between the functions
blocks.section_title: 职责和权限Responsibility and authority

blocks.text: concerned and the independence and authority necessary to perform the tasks.
blocks.section_title: 职责和权限Responsibility and authority

blocks.text: 最高管理者负责Top management is responsible to
blocks.section_title: 职责和权限Responsibility and authority

blocks.text: a) 确保在组织内对职责和权限进行定义，文件化和沟通
blocks.section_title: 职责和权限Responsibility and authority

blocks.text: ensure that responsibilities and authorities are defined, documented and communicated within the organization, b) 建立全体管理、执行和验证工作的人员之间的相互关系，以及确保为使其完成这些
blocks.section_title: 职责和权限Responsibility and authority

blocks.text: 任务所必要的独立性和权限。
blocks.section_title: 职责和权限Responsibility and authority

blocks.text: establish the interrelation of all personnel who manage, perform and verify work affecting quality, and ensure the independence and authority necessary to perform these tasks.
blocks.section_title: 职责和权限Responsibility and authority

blocks.text: 5.5.2 管理者代表Management Representative
blocks.section_title: 管理者代表Management Representative

blocks.text: 总经理被委任为管理者代表，其无论在其它方面的工作职责如何，应具有以下方面的职 责和权限：
blocks.section_title: 管理者代表Management Representative

blocks.text: The General Manager is appointed as the Management Representative who, irrespective of other responsibilities, have responsibility and authority that includes: a) 确保质量管理体系所需的过程得以建立、实施和维持。
blocks.section_title: 管理者代表Management Representative

blocks.text: Ensuring that processes needed for the Quality Management System are established,
blocks.section_title: 管理者代表Management Representative

blocks.text: implemented and maintained; b) 向最高管理者报告质量管理体系的绩效以及任何需要改进的地方，及
blocks.section_title: 管理者代表Management Representative

blocks.text: Reporting to top management on the performance of the Quality Management System and any need for improvement; and c) 确保在整个集团公司内推广满足适用的法规及质量管理体系要求的意识。
blocks.section_title: 管理者代表Management Representative

blocks.text: Ensuring the promotion of awareness of applicable regulatory requirements and quality management system requirements throughout the group.
blocks.section_title: 管理者代表Management Representative

blocks.text: 品质经理被委任为副管理者代表。
blocks.section_title: 管理者代表Management Representative

nearby_heading_context: 5.5.2 管理者代表Management Representative

blocks.text: The Quality Manager is appointed as the deputy Management Representative.
blocks.section_title: 管理者代表Management Representative

blocks.text: 5.5.3 内部沟通Internal communication
blocks.section_title: 内部沟通Internal communication

blocks.text: 许多定期会议以促进整个集团公司内部沟通。最高管理者有责任确保建立适当的沟通
blocks.section_title: 内部沟通Internal communication

blocks.text: 机制就质量管理体系的有效性进行沟通。定期质量会议，各公司及部门代表就供应
blocks.section_title: 内部沟通Internal communication

blocks.text: 商、客户及内部问题进行讨论，商讨纠正及预防措施。定期如开商业会议，质量、服
blocks.section_title: 内部沟通Internal communication

blocks.text: 务、制造及设计部门代表参加，评审公司业绩及客户反馈。年度管理评审会议，由管
blocks.section_title: 内部沟通Internal communication

blocks.text: 理者代表主持，最高管理团队参加，评审质量管理体系表现。
blocks.section_title: 内部沟通Internal communication

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第45页共83页
blocks.section_title: 内部沟通Internal communication

blocks.text: There are a number of regular meetings to facilitate internal communications throughout the group. Top management is responsible to ensure that appropriate communication processes are established within the group and company departments; and that communication takes place regarding the effectiveness of the Quality Management System. Regular Quality Meeting, with representatives from all departments, discusses quality problems resulting from suppliers, customers and internal problems. Corrective and Preventive actions are discussed. Commercial meetings are held regularly, attended by representatives of quality, service, production, and design, to review the performance of the companies and discuss customer feedback. Annually, the Quality Management review Meeting, chaired by Management Representative and attended by the top management team, review the performance of the Quality Management System.
blocks.section_title: 内部沟通Internal communication

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第46页共83页
blocks.section_title: 内部沟通Internal communication

blocks.text: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
blocks.section_title: 内部沟通Internal communication

blocks.text: 5.6 管理评审Management review
blocks.section_title: 管理评审Management review

blocks.text: 5.6.1 概述General
blocks.section_title: 概述General

blocks.text: 管理评审会议至少每年举行一次以评审质量管理体系以确保其持续的适宜性、充分性和
blocks.section_title: 概述General

blocks.text: 有效性。管理评审包括评价质量管理体系改进的机会和变更的需要，包括质量方针和质
blocks.section_title: 概述General

blocks.text: 量目标。
blocks.section_title: 概述General

blocks.text: The management review meeting is held at least once a year to review the Quality
blocks.section_title: 概述General

blocks.text: Management System to ensure its continuing suitability, adequacy and effectiveness. This
blocks.section_title: 概述General

blocks.text: review includes assessing opportunities for improvement and the need for changes to the
blocks.section_title: 概述General

blocks.text: Quality Management System, including the quality policy and quality objectives.
blocks.section_title: 概述General

blocks.text: 管理评审记录由管理者代表维护，存于DCC。
blocks.section_title: 概述General

blocks.text: Management review records are maintained by the MR and stored in DCC.
blocks.section_title: 概述General

blocks.text: 5.6.2 评审输入Review input
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: 管理评审输入包括但不限于以下方面的讯息：
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: The input to management review shall include, but is not limited to, information arising from:
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: a) 反馈；
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: Feedback; b) 投诉处置；
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: Complaint handling; c) 给监管机构的报告；
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: Reporting to regulatory authorities; d) 审核；
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: Audits e) 过程的监视和测量；
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: Monitoring and measurement of processes; f) 产品的监视和测量；
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: Monitoring and measurement of product; g) 纠正措施；
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: Corrective action h) 预防措施；
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: Preventive action i) 以往管理评审的跟踪措施；
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: Follow-up actions from previous management reviews; j) 可能影响质量管理体系的变更；
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: Changes that could affect the quality management system; k) 改进的建议；
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第47页共83页
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: Recommendations for improvement; l) 适用的新的或修订的法规要求。
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: Applicable new or revised regulatory requirements.
blocks.section_title: 评审输入Review input

blocks.text: 5.6.3 评审输出Review output
blocks.section_title: 评审输出Review output

blocks.text: 管理评审输出应予以记录（见4.2.5）并包括经评审的输入和于以下方面有关的任何决定
blocks.section_title: 评审输出Review output

blocks.text: 和措施：
blocks.section_title: 评审输出Review output

blocks.text: The output from management review shall be recorded (see 4.2.5) and include the input
blocks.section_title: 评审输出Review output

blocks.text: reviewed and any decisions and actions related to:
blocks.section_title: 评审输出Review output

blocks.text: a) 保持质量管理体系及其过程适宜性、充分性和有效性所需的改进；
blocks.section_title: 评审输出Review output

blocks.text: Improvement needed to maintain the suitability, adequacy, and effectiveness of the quality management system and its processes; b) 与客户要求有关的产品之改进；
blocks.section_title: 评审输出Review output

blocks.text: Improvement of product in accordance with customer requirements; c) 响应适用的新的或修订的法规要求所需的改变；
blocks.section_title: 评审输出Review output

p044_b0032 [5.5.3 | segment_0090]: 理者代表主持，最高管理团队参加，评审质量管理体系表现。
p045_b0003 [5.5.3 | segment_0091]: 页次Page No.： 第45页共83页
p045_b0006 [5.5.3 | segment_0091]: There are a number of regular meetings to facilitate internal communications throughout the group. Top management is responsible to ensure that appropriate communication processes are established within the group and company departments; and that communication takes place regarding the effectiveness of the Quality Management System. Regular Quality Meeting, with representatives from all departments, discusses quality problems resulting from suppliers, customers and internal problems. Corrective and Preventive actions are discussed. Commercial meetings are held regularly, attended by representatives of quality, service, production, and design, to review the performance of the companies and discuss customer feedback. Annually, the Quality Management review Meeting, chaired by Management Representative and attended by the top management team, review the performance of the Quality Management System.
p046_b0003 [5.5.3 | segment_0092]: 页次Page No.： 第46页共83页
p046_b0004 [5.5.3 | segment_0092]: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
p046_b0006 [5.6 | segment_0093]: 5.6 管理评审Management review
p046_b0008 [5.6.1 | segment_0094]: 5.6.1 概述General
p046_b0009 [5.6.1 | segment_0094]: 管理评审会议至少每年举行一次以评审质量管理体系以确保其持续的适宜性、充分性和
p046_b0010 [5.6.1 | segment_0094]: 有效性。管理评审包括评价质量管理体系改进的机会和变更的需要，包括质量方针和质
p046_b0011 [5.6.1 | segment_0094]: 量目标。
p046_b0012 [5.6.1 | segment_0094]: The management review meeting is held at least once a year to review the Quality
p046_b0013 [5.6.1 | segment_0094]: Management System to ensure its continuing suitability, adequacy and effectiveness. This
p046_b0014 [5.6.1 | segment_0094]: review includes assessing opportunities for improvement and the need for changes to the
p046_b0015 [5.6.1 | segment_0094]: Quality Management System, including the quality policy and quality objectives.
p046_b0017 [5.6.1 | segment_0094]: 管理评审记录由管理者代表维护，存于DCC。
p046_b0018 [5.6.1 | segment_0094]: Management review records are maintained by the MR and stored in DCC.
p046_b0019 [5.6.2 | segment_0095]: 5.6.2 评审输入Review input
p046_b0020 [5.6.2 | segment_0095]: 管理评审输入包括但不限于以下方面的讯息：
p046_b0021 [5.6.2 | segment_0095]: The input to management review shall include, but is not limited to, information arising from:
p046_b0022 [5.6.2 | segment_0095]: a) 反馈；
p046_b0023 [5.6.2 | segment_0095]: Feedback; b) 投诉处置；
p046_b0024 [5.6.2 | segment_0095]: Complaint handling; c) 给监管机构的报告；
p046_b0025 [5.6.2 | segment_0095]: Reporting to regulatory authorities; d) 审核；
p046_b0026 [5.6.2 | segment_0095]: Audits e) 过程的监视和测量；
p046_b0027 [5.6.2 | segment_0095]: Monitoring and measurement of processes; f) 产品的监视和测量；
p046_b0028 [5.6.2 | segment_0095]: Monitoring and measurement of product; g) 纠正措施；
p046_b0029 [5.6.2 | segment_0095]: Corrective action h) 预防措施；
p046_b0030 [5.6.2 | segment_0095]: Preventive action i) 以往管理评审的跟踪措施；
p046_b0031 [5.6.2 | segment_0095]: Follow-up actions from previous management reviews; j) 可能影响质量管理体系的变更；
p046_b0032 [5.6.2 | segment_0095]: Changes that could affect the quality management system; k) 改进的建议；
p047_b0003 [5.6.2 | segment_0096]: 页次Page No.： 第47页共83页
p047_b0004 [5.6.2 | segment_0096]: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
p047_b0006 [5.6.2 | segment_0096]: Recommendations for improvement; l) 适用的新的或修订的法规要求。
p047_b0007 [5.6.2 | segment_0096]: Applicable new or revised regulatory requirements.
p047_b0008 [5.6.3 | segment_0097]: 5.6.3 评审输出Review output
p047_b0009 [5.6.3 | segment_0097]: 管理评审输出应予以记录（见4.2.5）并包括经评审的输入和于以下方面有关的任何决定
p047_b0010 [5.6.3 | segment_0097]: 和措施：
p047_b0011 [5.6.3 | segment_0097]: The output from management review shall be recorded (see 4.2.5) and include the input
p047_b0012 [5.6.3 | segment_0097]: reviewed and any decisions and actions related to:
p047_b0013 [5.6.3 | segment_0097]: a) 保持质量管理体系及其过程适宜性、充分性和有效性所需的改进；
p047_b0014 [5.6.3 | segment_0097]: Improvement needed to maintain the suitability, adequacy, and effectiveness of the quality management system and its processes; b) 与客户要求有关的产品之改进；
p047_b0015 [5.6.3 | segment_0097]: Improvement of product in accordance with customer requirements; c) 响应适用的新的或修订的法规要求所需的改变；

blocks.section_title: 概述General

blocks.text: 6.4.1 工作环境Work environment
blocks.section_title: 工作环境Work environment

blocks.text: 应将符合产品要求所需的工作环境的要求形成文件。将监视和控制工作环境的程序形
blocks.section_title: 工作环境Work environment

blocks.text: 成文件，应：
blocks.section_title: 工作环境Work environment

blocks.text: The Group shall document the requirements for the work environment needed to achieve
blocks.section_title: 工作环境Work environment

blocks.text: conformity to product requirements. If the conditions for the work environment can have
blocks.section_title: 工作环境Work environment

blocks.text: an adverse effect on product quality, the Group shall document the requirements for the
blocks.section_title: 工作环境Work environment

blocks.text: work environment and the procedures to monitor and control the work environment. The
blocks.section_title: 工作环境Work environment

blocks.text: Group shall: a) 建立对特定人员的健康、清洁和着装要求形成文件。此类人员与产品或工作环境的
blocks.section_title: 工作环境Work environment

blocks.text: 接触可能影响医疗器械的安全或性能
blocks.section_title: 工作环境Work environment

blocks.text: Document requirements for health, cleanliness and clothing of personnel if contact between such personnel and the product or work environment could affect medical device safety or performance; b) 生产经理和品质经理负责确保其被要求在特殊环境下临时工作的下属均接受了适
blocks.section_title: 工作环境Work environment

blocks.text: 当的培训或在受过训练的人员监督下工作。（见6.2.2b）
blocks.section_title: 工作环境Work environment

blocks.text: The Production Manager and the Quality Manager are responsible to ensure that all their subordinates who are required to work temporarily under special environmental conditions within the work environment are appropriately trained or supervised by a trained person (see 6.2.2b).
blocks.section_title: 工作环境Work environment

blocks.text: 已受污染、有可能已受污染或易受污染的产品被视为不合格产品，并且应根据形成文

blocks.text: 件的程序予以控制以防止对其它产品、工作环境或人员的污染。
blocks.section_title: 污染控制Contamination control

blocks.text: As appropriate, the Group shall plan and document arrangements for the control of
blocks.section_title: 污染控制Contamination control

blocks.text: contaminated or potentially contaminated product in order to prevent contamination of
blocks.section_title: 污染控制Contamination control

blocks.text: the work environment, personnel, or product.

blocks.text: 中需保持的洁净度要求均以与该产品相关的生产文件体现。
blocks.section_title: 污染控制Contamination control

blocks.text: For sterile medical devices, the organization shall document requirements for control of
blocks.section_title: 污染控制Contamination control

blocks.section_title: 污染控制Contamination control

blocks.text: 7.1.3 在对产品实现进行策划时，确定以下方面的适当内容：
blocks.section_title: 在对产品实现进行策划时，确定以下方面的适当内容：

blocks.text: In planning product realization, the following are determined as appropriate:
blocks.section_title: 在对产品实现进行策划时，确定以下方面的适当内容：

blocks.text: a) 产品的质量目标和要求；
blocks.section_title: 在对产品实现进行策划时，确定以下方面的适当内容：

blocks.text: Quality Objectives and requirements for the product; b) 针对产品建立过程、文件（见4.2.4）和提供基础设施和工作环境相关资源的需求；
blocks.section_title: 在对产品实现进行策划时，确定以下方面的适当内容：

blocks.text: The need to establish processes and documents (see 4.2.4) and to provide resources specific to the product, including infrastructure and work environment; c) 针对产品所要求的验证、确认、监视、测量、检验和试验、处置、贮存、流通和可追
blocks.section_title: 在对产品实现进行策划时，确定以下方面的适当内容：

blocks.text: 溯性活动，以及产品接收准则；
blocks.section_title: 在对产品实现进行策划时，确定以下方面的适当内容：

blocks.text: Required verification, validation, monitoring, measurement, inspection and test, handling, storage, distribution and traceability activities specific to the product together with the criteria for product acceptance; d) 记录用以证明产品实现的过程和生产的产品符合要求（见4.2.5）。
blocks.section_title: 在对产品实现进行策划时，确定以下方面的适当内容：

blocks.text: Records are required to provide evidence that the realization processes and product meet
blocks.section_title: 在对产品实现进行策划时，确定以下方面的适当内容：

blocks.text: requirements(see 4.2.5).
blocks.section_title: 在对产品实现进行策划时，确定以下方面的适当内容：

blocks.text: 7.2 与顾客有关的过程Customer-related processes
blocks.section_title: 与顾客有关的过程Customer-related processes

blocks.text: 7.2.1 与产品有关的要求之确定
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求之确定

blocks.text: Determination of requirements related to the product 市场部负责主导确定与产品有关的要求。当有需要时，研发/工程部和其它部门须提供 其专门知识协助市场部。
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求之确定

blocks.text: Marketing is responsible for leading the team for the determination of product requirements. When required, R&D/ Engineering and other departments will support the Marketing with their expertise. 应确定以下要求：
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求之确定

blocks.text: The following requirements are required to be determined a) 客户指定的要求，包括对交付及交付后活动的要求；
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求之确定

blocks.text: Requirements specified by the customer, including the requirements for delivery and post- delivery activities； b) 客户没有明示要求，但指定的用途或已知的预期用途所必需的要求；
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求之确定

blocks.text: Requirements not stated by the customer, but necessary for specified use or known intended use, where known; c) 与产品有关的适用的法规要求；
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求之确定

blocks.text: Applicable regulatory requirements related to the product; d) 确保医疗器械的特定性能和安全使用所需的任何用户培训；
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求之确定

blocks.text: Any user training needed to ensure specified performance and safe use of the medical device; e) 集团公司确定的任何附加要求。
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求之确定

blocks.text: Any additional requirements to ensure the customer’s satisfaction as determined by the group.
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求之确定

blocks.text: 7.2.2 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product

blocks.text: 集团公司应在向客户作出提供产品的承诺之前对产品有关的要求进行评审以确保:
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product

blocks.text: Review the requirements related to the product prior to the Company’s commitment to supply a product to the customer and to ensure that: a) 产品要求得到规定并形成文件；
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product

blocks.text: Product requirements are defined and documented, b) 与以前表述不一致的合同或订单的要求已得到解决；
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product

blocks.text: Contract or order requirements differing from those previously expressed are resolved; c) 满足适用法规的要求；
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product

blocks.text: Applicable regulatory requirements are met; d) 依照7.2.1 识别的任何用户培训是可获得的或按计划是可获得的
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product

blocks.text: Any user training identified in accordance with 7.2.1 is available or planned to be available; e) 集团公司有能力满足规定的要求。
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product

blocks.text: The group has the ability to meet the defined requirements.
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第55页共83页
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product

blocks.text: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product

blocks.text: 评审结果及评审所形成的措施的记录由市场部维持（见4.2.5）。
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product

blocks.text: Records of the results of the contract review and actions arising from the review are maintained in the Marketing Department (see 4.2.5). 若客户的要求没有形成文件，客户的要求在接受前应由双方确认。
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product

blocks.text: Where a customer provides no documented statement of requirements, the customer requirements are confirmed by both parties prior to the acceptance of any order as part of the contract review process. 若产品要求发生变更，相关文件应得到修改并且相关人员知道已变更的要求。
blocks.section_title: 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product

p053_b0015 [7.1.1 | segment_0119]: diagram Appendix I. Planning of product realization shall be consistent with the
p053_b0016 [7.1.1 | segment_0119]: requirements of the Quality Management System.
p053_b0017 [7.1.2 | segment_0120]: 7.1.2 在产品的实验过程中，将风险管理的一个或多个过程形成文件。保留风险管理活动的
p053_b0018 [7.1.2 | segment_0120]: 记录（见4.2.5）
p053_b0019 [7.1.2 | segment_0120]: The Group shall document one or more processes for risk management in product
p053_b0020 [7.1.2 | segment_0120]: realization. Records of risk management activities shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).
p053_b0021 [7.1.3 | segment_0121]: 7.1.3 在对产品实现进行策划时，确定以下方面的适当内容：
p053_b0022 [7.1.3 | segment_0121]: In planning product realization, the following are determined as appropriate:
p053_b0023 [7.1.3 | segment_0121]: a) 产品的质量目标和要求；
p053_b0024 [7.1.3 | segment_0121]: Quality Objectives and requirements for the product; b) 针对产品建立过程、文件（见4.2.4）和提供基础设施和工作环境相关资源的需求；
p053_b0025 [7.1.3 | segment_0121]: The need to establish processes and documents (see 4.2.4) and to provide resources specific to the product, including infrastructure and work environment; c) 针对产品所要求的验证、确认、监视、测量、检验和试验、处置、贮存、流通和可追
p053_b0026 [7.1.3 | segment_0121]: 溯性活动，以及产品接收准则；
p053_b0027 [7.1.3 | segment_0121]: Required verification, validation, monitoring, measurement, inspection and test, handling, storage, distribution and traceability activities specific to the product together with the criteria for product acceptance; d) 记录用以证明产品实现的过程和生产的产品符合要求（见4.2.5）。
p053_b0028 [7.1.3 | segment_0121]: Records are required to provide evidence that the realization processes and product meet
p053_b0029 [7.1.3 | segment_0121]: requirements(see 4.2.5).
p053_b0030 [7.1.4 | segment_0122]: 7.1.4 该策划的输出可以是程序/流程图、作业指引、检验指引，及/或规格等。
p053_b0031 [7.1.4 | segment_0122]: The output of this planning can be the procedure/ flowchart, work instruction, inspection
p053_b0032 [7.1.4 | segment_0122]: instructions, and/or specifications etc.

p054_b0006 [7.2 | segment_0124]: 7.2 与顾客有关的过程Customer-related processes
p054_b0007 [7.2.1 | segment_0125]: 7.2.1 与产品有关的要求之确定
p054_b0008 [7.2.1 | segment_0125]: Determination of requirements related to the product 市场部负责主导确定与产品有关的要求。当有需要时，研发/工程部和其它部门须提供 其专门知识协助市场部。
p054_b0009 [7.2.1 | segment_0125]: Marketing is responsible for leading the team for the determination of product requirements. When required, R&D/ Engineering and other departments will support the Marketing with their expertise. 应确定以下要求：
p054_b0010 [7.2.1 | segment_0125]: The following requirements are required to be determined a) 客户指定的要求，包括对交付及交付后活动的要求；
p054_b0011 [7.2.1 | segment_0125]: Requirements specified by the customer, including the requirements for delivery and post- delivery activities； b) 客户没有明示要求，但指定的用途或已知的预期用途所必需的要求；
p054_b0012 [7.2.1 | segment_0125]: Requirements not stated by the customer, but necessary for specified use or known intended use, where known; c) 与产品有关的适用的法规要求；
p054_b0013 [7.2.1 | segment_0125]: Applicable regulatory requirements related to the product; d) 确保医疗器械的特定性能和安全使用所需的任何用户培训；
p054_b0014 [7.2.1 | segment_0125]: Any user training needed to ensure specified performance and safe use of the medical device; e) 集团公司确定的任何附加要求。
p054_b0015 [7.2.1 | segment_0125]: Any additional requirements to ensure the customer’s satisfaction as determined by the group.
p054_b0016 [7.2.2 | segment_0126]: 7.2.2 与产品有关的要求的评审Review of requirements related to the product
p054_b0017 [7.2.2 | segment_0126]: 集团公司应在向客户作出提供产品的承诺之前对产品有关的要求进行评审以确保:
p054_b0018 [7.2.2 | segment_0126]: Review the requirements related to the product prior to the Company’s commitment to supply a product to the customer and to ensure that: a) 产品要求得到规定并形成文件；
p054_b0019 [7.2.2 | segment_0126]: Product requirements are defined and documented, b) 与以前表述不一致的合同或订单的要求已得到解决；
p054_b0020 [7.2.2 | segment_0126]: Contract or order requirements differing from those previously expressed are resolved; c) 满足适用法规的要求；
p054_b0021 [7.2.2 | segment_0126]: Applicable regulatory requirements are met; d) 依照7.2.1 识别的任何用户培训是可获得的或按计划是可获得的
p054_b0022 [7.2.2 | segment_0126]: Any user training identified in accordance with 7.2.1 is available or planned to be available; e) 集团公司有能力满足规定的要求。
p054_b0023 [7.2.2 | segment_0126]: The group has the ability to meet the defined requirements.

blocks.text: 7.2.3 客户沟通Customer communication
blocks.section_title: 客户沟通Customer communication

blocks.text: 通过拜访、电邮、电话、传真、网络、会议、信函或其它有效的方法与客户沟通应有关 以下方面：
blocks.section_title: 客户沟通Customer communication

blocks.text: Implement effective arrangements for communicating such as visiting, email, phone, fax, internet, meeting or letter, with customers in relation to ： a) 产品信息；
blocks.section_title: 客户沟通Customer communication

blocks.text: Product information; b) 问询、合同或订单和处理，包括对其修改；
blocks.section_title: 客户沟通Customer communication

blocks.text: Enquiries, contracts or order handling, including amendments; c) 客户反馈，包括投诉；
blocks.section_title: 客户沟通Customer communication

blocks.text: Customer feedback, including complaints; d) 忠告性通知。
blocks.section_title: 客户沟通Customer communication

blocks.text: Advisory notices. 集团公司按照适用的法规要求通过有效的方式与相关监管机构沟通
blocks.section_title: 客户沟通Customer communication

blocks.text: The Group shall communicate with regulatory authorities in accordance with applicable regulatory requirements.

p056_b0006 [7.3 | segment_0131]: 7.3 设计和开发Design and Development
p056_b0007 [7.3.1 | segment_0132]: 7.3.1 总则General 设计过程中遵循的逻辑顺序，确定用户需要，确定设计输入和设计输出。在每一个阶段， 根据设计输入的要求，对设计进行评审和验证，以确保达到功能和操作要求。当设计输
p056_b0008 [7.3.1 | segment_0132]: 入进行了评审，并且设计输入要求确认后，开始输入要求转化为输出反复的过程。设计 和开发程序应形成文件。
p056_b0009 [7.3.1 | segment_0132]: The design process follows a logical sequence; define user needs, determining design input requirements and producing the design out. At each stage, the design is reviewed against the input requirements and verified to ensure that functional and operational requirements are
p056_b0010 [7.3.1 | segment_0132]: achieved. When the design input has been reviewed and design input requirements accepted, an iterative process of translating requirements into design output commences. The Group shall document procedures for design and development. 7.3.2 设计和开发策划Design and development planning 研发总监及其团队负责确保产品设计和开发均有策划、控制和监督，均达至法规要求和 质量目标。设计计划是一份实时文件，随项目进展而变更、扩展及完善。
p056_b0011 [7.3.1 | segment_0132]: R&D Director and his/ her team are responsible to ensure that the product design and development is planned, controlled and monitored, and that regulatory requirements and quality objectives are achieved. A design plan is a living document, which changes, expands, and refined as the project proceeds.
p056_b0012 [7.3.1 | segment_0132]: 设计和开发策划时，应将以下方面形成文件：
p056_b0013 [7.3.1 | segment_0132]: During the design and development planning, the Group shall document: a) 设计和开发的各个阶段；
p056_b0014 [7.3.1 | segment_0132]: The design and development stages; b) 每个设计和开发阶段所需的一个或多个评审；
p056_b0015 [7.3.1 | segment_0132]: The review(s) needed at each design and development stage; c) 适合于每个设计和开发阶段的验证、确认和设计转换活动；
p056_b0016 [7.3.1 | segment_0132]: The verification, validation, and design transfer activities that are appropriate at each design and development stage; d) 设计和开发的职责和权限；
p056_b0017 [7.3.1 | segment_0132]: The responsibilities and authorities for design and development; e) 确保设计和开发输出到设计和开发输入的可追溯的方法；
p056_b0018 [7.3.1 | segment_0132]: The methods to ensure traceability of design and development outputs to design and development inputs; f) 所需的资源，包括必要的人员能力。
p056_b0019 [7.3.1 | segment_0132]: The resources needed, including necessary competence of personnel. 7.3.3 设计和开发输入Design and development inputs
p057_b0003 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: 页次Page No.： 第57页共83页
p057_b0004 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
p057_b0006 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: 设计输入要求形成最终设计确认的基础。在设计过程的初始阶段，阐述产品概念、扩展、 并转化成一整套设计输入要求，这些要求将转化为一个高层次的设计规范。
p057_b0007 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: During the planning phase of product development, inputs related to product requirement will be determined. These design input requirements form the basis for the eventual validation of the design. In the initial phase of the design process the product concept description is elaborated, expanded and transformed into a complete set of design input requirements which are converted into a high level design specification.
p057_b0008 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: 确定并记录与产品要求有关的输入（见4.2.5）
p057_b0009 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: Inputs relating to product requirements are determined and recorded (see 4.2.5) 这些输入包括：
p057_b0010 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: These inputs include
p057_b0011 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: a) 根据预期用途，规定的功能、性能、可用性和安全要求；
p057_b0012 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: Functional, performance, usability and safety requirements, according to the intended use; b) 适用的法规要求和标准；
p057_b0013 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: Applicable regulatory requirements and standards; c) 适用的风险管理的一个或多个输出；
p057_b0014 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: Applicable output(s) of risk management; d) 适当时，来源于以前类似设计的信息；

p057_b0015 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: As appropriate, information derived from previous similar designs; e) 产品和过程的设计和开发所必须的其他要求。
p057_b0016 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: Other requirements essential for design and development of the product and processes. 应对输入进行评审，并批准，以确保设计和开发输入时充分和适宜的。所提出的要求完 成、清楚、能够被验证或确认，并且不能相互矛盾。
p057_b0017 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: These inputs shall be reviewed and for adequacy and approved. Requirements shall be complete, unambiguous, able to be verified or validated, and not in conflict with each other. 7.3.4 设计和开发输出Design and development outputs 设计输出以能够充分满足评估输入的的方式表达，标识产品安全和功能至关重要的特 性，包括生产规格和材料规格等
p057_b0018 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: Design output is expressed in terms that allow adequate assessment of conformance to the input requirements and identify the characteristics of the design that are crucial to the safety and functioning of the device, including production specification, and material specifications, etc. 研发总监负责确保设计和开发输出
p057_b0019 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: The R&D Director is responsible to ensure that the outputs of design and development a) 以表格的形式提出，以验证设计和开发输入，并在放行前得到批准
p057_b0020 [7.3.1 | segment_0133]: Are provided in a form that enables verification against the design and development
p058_b0003 [7.3.1 | segment_0134]: 页次Page No.： 第58页共83页
p058_b0004 [7.3.1 | segment_0134]: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
p058_b0006 [7.3.1 | segment_0134]: input and are approved prior to release, b) 满足设计和开发输入的要求
p058_b0007 [7.3.1 | segment_0134]: Meet the input requirements for design and development, c) 给出采购、生产和服务提供的适当信息
p058_b0008 [7.3.1 | segment_0134]: Provide appropriate information for purchasing, production and service provision, d) 包含或引用产品接收准则
p058_b0009 [7.3.1 | segment_0134]: Contain or reference product acceptance criteria, and e) 规定对产品的安全和正常使用所必需的产品特性。
p058_b0010 [7.3.1 | segment_0134]: Specify the characteristics of the product that are essential for its safe and proper use. 生产规格包括图纸，配件及原材料规格，包装及标识，IFU，等等。
p058_b0011 [7.3.1 | segment_0134]: For the production specifications, it includes drawings, component and material specifications, packaging and labeling, IFU, and etc. 保持设计和开发输出的记录（见4.2.5）。
p058_b0012 [7.3.1 | segment_0134]: All Records of the design and development outputs are maintained (see 4.2.5). 7.3.5 设计和开发评审Design and development review 设计评审的目的是在设计初始阶段检测潜在问题，以确保满足设计输入要求，并为对质 量有影响的各部门提供一个评审设计方案的机会，包括：生产、质量、市场或其它专家。
p058_b0013 [7.3.1 | segment_0134]: The purpose of design reviews is to detect the potential problems early in the design process, to ensure that the design satisfies the design input requirements and to provide an opportunity for all departments/divisions which have impact on quality including: manufacturing, quality, marketing or other specialists to review design proposals. 计划并执行设计评审，在各阶段末或在设计过程的重要环节，以评估设计结果能满足要 求。
p058_b0014 [7.3.1 | segment_0134]: Design reviews are planned and conducted at the end of each phase or at important milestones in the design process to evaluate the ability of the results of the design to meet the requirements. 保存设计和开发评审的所有记录（见4.2.5）。
p058_b0015 [7.3.1 | segment_0134]: Records of the results of the reviews and any necessary actions shall be maintained and include the identification of the design under review, the participants involved and the date of the review (see 4.2.5). 7.3.6 设计和开发验证Design and development verification 设计验证是设计的详细测验，按设计计划规定，在设计各阶段完成时进行测试验证。
p058_b0016 [7.3.1 | segment_0134]: Design verification is a detailed examination of the design, conducted at the completion of
p058_b0017 [7.3.1 | segment_0134]: each stage of the design as identified in the design plan.
p059_b0003 [7.3.1 | segment_0135]: 页次Page No.： 第59页共83页
p059_b0004 [7.3.1 | segment_0135]: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
p059_b0006 [7.3.1 | segment_0135]: 验证活动与设计评审相辅相成，作为结构性评估以建立设计输出符合设计输入要求。
p059_b0007 [7.3.1 | segment_0135]: The verification activity is part of design review and is a structured assessment to establish that the design output meets the design input requirements. 验证计划需形成文件，包含方法、接收准则、适当时包括包含样本量原理的统计技术。
p059_b0008 [7.3.1 | segment_0135]: The Group shall document verification plans that include methods, acceptance criteria and, as appropriate, statistical techniques with rationale for sample size. 部分医疗器械预期用途要求连接至或通过接口连接至其他的医疗器械，验证时应包括 证实连接或通过接口连接时设计输出满足设计输入的要求
p059_b0009 [7.3.1 | segment_0135]: If the intended use requires that the medical device be connected to, or have an interface with, other medical device(s), verification shall include confirmation that the design outputs meet design inputs when so connected or interfaced.
p059_b0010 [7.3.1 | segment_0135]: 记录并保存设计验证的所有记录（见4.2.5）。
p059_b0011 [7.3.1 | segment_0135]: All results of the design verifications are recorded and maintained (see 4.2.5) 7.3.7 设计和开发确认Design and development validation 设计确认是所有努力的总和，确保设计满足最终用户及患者的需求和预期用途。设计确 认对生产首件进行，而不是模型。
p059_b0012 [7.3.1 | segment_0135]: Design validation is the cumulative summation of all efforts to ensure that the design will confirm to the end user and patient needs and the intended use. It is performed on the initial production units, not prototypes.
p059_b0013 [7.3.1 | segment_0135]: 确定接收标准时，被评估和确认的参数在设计策划阶段予以识别。 The performance characteristics to be assessed and validated are identified at the design planning stage when the acceptance criteria are established.
p059_b0014 [7.3.1 | segment_0135]: 成品实际环境的性能测试可在仿真环境进行，如温度，震动和摇摆等。

blocks.text: 7.3.8 设计和开发转换 Design and development transfer 集团公司应将设计和开发输出向制造转换的程序形成文件，这些程序应确保设计和开 发输出在成为最终生产规范前经验证适合于制造并确保生产能力能满足产品要求。应 记录转换的结果和结论（见4.2.5）
blocks.section_title: 总则General 设计过程中遵循的逻辑顺序，确定用户需要，确定设计输入和设计输出。在每一个阶段， 根据设计输入的要求，对设计进行评审和验证，以确保达到功能和操作要求。当设计输

blocks.text: The Group shall document procedures for transfer of design and development outputs to manufacturing. These procedures shall ensure that design and development outputs are verified as suitable for manufacturing before becoming final production specifications and that production capability can meet product requirements. Results and conclusions of the transfer shall be recorded (see 4.2.5). 7.3.9 设计和开发更改的控制Control of design and development changes

The Group shall determine the significance of the change to function, performance, usability, safety and applicable regulatory requirements listed in 0.4.2 for the medical device and its intended use. 应识别设计和开发的更改。更改在实施前应经：

blocks.text: 7.4 采购Purchasing
blocks.section_title: 采购Purchasing

blocks.text: 7.4.1 采购过程Purchasing process
blocks.section_title: 采购过程Purchasing process

blocks.text: 应将确保采购的产品符合规定的采购信息的程序形成文件（见4.2.4）。
blocks.section_title: 采购过程Purchasing process

blocks.text: The Group shall document procedures (see 4.2.4) to ensure that purchased product conforms to specified purchasing information. 建立评价和选择供方的准则，准则应：
blocks.section_title: 采购过程Purchasing process

blocks.text: The Group shall establish criteria for the evaluation and selection of suppliers. The criteria shall be: a) 基于供方提供满足组织要求的产品的能力；
blocks.section_title: 采购过程Purchasing process

blocks.text: Based on the supplier’s ability to provide product that meets the organization’s requirements; b) 基于供方的绩效；
blocks.section_title: 采购过程Purchasing process

blocks.text: Based on the performance of the supplier; c) 基于采购产品对医疗器械质量的影响；
blocks.section_title: 采购过程Purchasing process

blocks.text: Based on the effect of the purchased product on the quality of the medical device; d) 与医疗器械相关风险相适应。
blocks.section_title: 采购过程Purchasing process

block_text:
p059_b0015 [7.3.1 | segment_0135]: Finished devices are tested for performance under actual conditions of use and may be subjected to simulated environmental conditions, such as temperature, shock, and vibration, etc.
p059_b0016 [7.3.1 | segment_0135]: 产品临床评估在过程确认阶段进行，如要求临床研究，应符合适当的法规要求。确认也 记录将影响客户、最终用户和患者的设计问题。保存设计确认活动记录，作为技术档案 的一部分（见4.2.5）。
p059_b0017 [7.3.1 | segment_0135]: Clinical evaluation of the device is undertaken during the validation process and if clinical investigations are required, these shall conform to the appropriate regulatory requirements. Validation also addresses aspects of the design, which may have implications for the customer, end user and patient. The design validation activity is recorded and maintained as the part of the technical file. (see 4.2.5).
p060_b0003 [7.3.1 | segment_0136]: 页次Page No.： 第60页共83页
p060_b0004 [7.3.1 | segment_0136]: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
p060_b0006 [7.3.1 | segment_0136]: 7.3.8 设计和开发转换 Design and development transfer 集团公司应将设计和开发输出向制造转换的程序形成文件，这些程序应确保设计和开 发输出在成为最终生产规范前经验证适合于制造并确保生产能力能满足产品要求。应 记录转换的结果和结论（见4.2.5）
p060_b0007 [7.3.1 | segment_0136]: The Group shall document procedures for transfer of design and development outputs to manufacturing. These procedures shall ensure that design and development outputs are verified as suitable for manufacturing before becoming final production specifications and that production capability can meet product requirements. Results and conclusions of the transfer shall be recorded (see 4.2.5). 7.3.9 设计和开发更改的控制Control of design and development changes
p060_b0008 [7.3.1 | segment_0136]: 集团公司应将设计和开发更改的程序形成文件。应确定更改对于医疗器械功能、性能、 可用性、安全、0.4.2 所列适用的法规要求及其预期用途等的重要程度。
p060_b0009 [7.3.1 | segment_0136]: The Group shall document procedures to control design and development changes. The Group shall determine the significance of the change to function, performance, usability, safety and applicable regulatory requirements listed in 0.4.2 for the medical device and its intended use. 应识别设计和开发的更改。更改在实施前应经：
p060_b0010 [7.3.1 | segment_0136]: Design and development changes shall be identified. Before implementation, the changes shall be: a) 评审；
p060_b0011 [7.3.1 | segment_0136]: reviewed; b) 验证；
p060_b0012 [7.3.1 | segment_0136]: verified; c) 适当时，确认；
p060_b0013 [7.3.1 | segment_0136]: validated, as appropriate; d) 批准。
p060_b0014 [7.3.1 | segment_0136]: approved; 设计和开发更改的评审应包括评价更改对 在制的或已交付的组成部件和产品的影响， 以及对风险管理的输入或输出和产品实现过程的影响。
p060_b0015 [7.3.1 | segment_0136]: The review of design and development changes shall include evaluation of the effect of the changes on constituent parts and product in process or already delivered, inputs or outputs of risk management and product realization processes. 应保留更改及评审和任何必要的措施的记录（见4.2.5）
p060_b0016 [7.3.1 | segment_0136]: Records of changes, their review and any necessary actions shall be maintained (see 4.2.5). 7.3.10 设计和开发文档 Documents of design and development
p060_b0017 [7.3.1 | segment_0136]: 集团公司就每个医疗器械类型或医疗器械族保留设计和开发文档，文档应包含或引用 形成的记录以证明符合设计和开发要求，该文档还应包含设计和开发更改的记录。
p061_b0003 [7.3.1 | segment_0137]: 页次Page No.： 第61页共83页
p061_b0004 [7.3.1 | segment_0137]: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
p061_b0006 [7.3.1 | segment_0137]: The Group shall maintain a design and development file for each medical device type or medical device family. This file shall include or reference records generated to demonstrate conformity to the requirements for design and development and records for design and development changes. 7.3.11 辅助程序Supporting procedures

p062_b0010 [7.4.1 | segment_0140]: The Group shall establish criteria for the evaluation and selection of suppliers. The criteria shall be: a) 基于供方提供满足组织要求的产品的能力；
p062_b0011 [7.4.1 | segment_0140]: Based on the supplier’s ability to provide product that meets the organization’s requirements; b) 基于供方的绩效；
p062_b0012 [7.4.1 | segment_0140]: Based on the performance of the supplier; c) 基于采购产品对医疗器械质量的影响；

p062_b0015 [7.4.1 | segment_0140]: 和再评价活动，并报告供方满足采购产品的要求的绩效，其结果应为供方再评价过程提 供输入。

blocks.text: The General Manager has the final authority of approving new supplier proposed by Purchasing. Purchasing Manager shall plan the monitoring and re-evaluation of suppliers. Supplier performance in meeting requirements for the purchased product shall be monitored.

blocks.text: The results of the monitoring shall provide an input into the supplier re-evaluation process. 供应商的核准可通过对产品样板的评估或文件评审等方法。供应商的业绩应予监控并 定期评估。

blocks.section_title: 采购过程Purchasing process

blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: 采购部负责确保：
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: Purchasing is responsible to ensure: 拟采购产品的采购信息应表述或引用，适当时包括：
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: Purchasing information shall describe or reference the product to be purchased, including as appropriate:
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: a) 产品规范；
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: Product specifications;
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: b) 产品接收、程序、过程和设备的要求；
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: Requirements for product acceptance, procedures, processes and equipment;
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: c) 供方人员资格要求；
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: Requirements for qualification of supplier personnel;
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: d) 质量管理体系要求。
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: Quality management system requirements. 在与供应商沟通前，确保所规定的采购要求是充分和适宜的
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: The Group shall ensure the adequacy of specified purchasing requirements prior to their communication to the supplier.
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: 适用时，采购信息应包括书面协议，该协议明确了在影响采购产品满足规定的采购要求 的能力的任何更改实施前，供方应将采购产品方面的更改通知集团公司。
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: Purchasing information shall include, as applicable, a written agreement that the supplier notify the Group of changes in the purchased product prior to implementation of any changes that affect the ability of the purchased product to meet specified purchase requirements. 采购信息由采购部按照7.5.9 规定的可追溯性要求的范围和程度，以文件（见4.2.4）和 记录（见4.2.5）的形式保持。
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: To the extent required for traceability given in 7.5.9, the Group shall maintain relevant purchasing information in the form of documents (see 4.2.4) and records (see 4.2.5).
blocks.section_title: 采购信息Purchasing Information

blocks.text: 执行来料检验或验证以确保所采购的产品满足规定的采购要求。品质部负责根据来料 检验程序执行必要的来料检验。
blocks.section_title: 采购产品的验证Verification of purchased product

blocks.text: specified purchase requirements. Quality Engineer is responsible for performing the required incoming inspections to verify the quality of each shipment in accordance with the Incoming Inspection Procedure. 采购产品验证活动的范围基于供方的评价结果，并与采购产品有关的风险相适应。
blocks.section_title: 采购产品的验证Verification of purchased product

blocks.text: The extent of verification activities shall be based on the supplier evaluation results and proportionate to the risks associated with the purchased product. 若察觉到采购产品的任何更改，应确定这些更改是否影响到产品实现过程或医疗器械 最终产品。
blocks.section_title: 采购产品的验证Verification of purchased product

blocks.text: When the Group becomes aware of any changes to the purchased product, the organization shall determine whether these changes affect the product realization process or the medical device.
blocks.section_title: 采购产品的验证Verification of purchased product

blocks.text: 当公司或其客户拟在供方的现场实施验证时，对拟验证的安排和产品放行的方法应在 采购信息中作出规定。
blocks.section_title: 采购产品的验证Verification of purchased product

blocks.text: When the company or its customer intends to perform verification at the supplier’s premises, the intended verification arrangements and method of product release are stated in the purchasing information. 验证的记录应予以保持。
blocks.section_title: 采购产品的验证Verification of purchased product

blocks.text: Records of the verification are maintained.

blocks.text: 7.5 生产提供Production Provision
blocks.section_title: 生产提供Production Provision

blocks.text: 7.5.1 生产提供的控制Control of production provision
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: 生产经理应对生产提供予以策划、实施、监视和控制以确保产品符合规范，适当时包
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: 括但不限于：
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: Production and service provision shall be planned, carried out, monitored and controlled to
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: ensure that product conforms to specification. As appropriate, production controls shall
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: include but are not limited to:
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: a) 编制生产控制程序和控制方法的文件（见4.2.4）；
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: Documentation of procedures and methods for the control of production (see 4.2.4);
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: b) 基础设施鉴定；
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: Qualification of infrastructure;
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: c) 实施过程参数和产品特性的监视和测量；
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: Implementation of monitoring and measurement of process parameters and product
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: characteristics;
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: d) 获得和使用监视和测量设备；
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: Availability and use of monitoring and measuring equipment;
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: e) 对标记和包装实施规定的操作；
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: Implementation of defined operations for labelling and packaging;
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: f) 实施产品放行、交付和交付后活动。
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: Implementation of product release, delivery and post-delivery activities.
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: 公司应保持每一批医疗器械的记录（见4.2.5），提供可追溯到各部件的批号，并标
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: 明生产数量和批准销售的数量。每批的记录应由指定人员加以验证和批准。
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: Company should establish the necessary processes to maintain records (see 4.2.5) for
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: each lot of medical devices that provides traceability to the lot numbers of the
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: component parts and identifies the amount manufactured and amount approved for
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: distribution. The lot records are verified and approved by designated personnel.
blocks.section_title: 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

blocks.text: 7.5.2 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: 在下列情况下，应将产品的清洁或污染控制要求形成文件：
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: The Group shall document requirements for cleanliness of product or contamination
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: control of product if:
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: a) 产品在灭菌或使用前由组织进行清洁；
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: Product is cleaned by the organization prior to sterilization or its use;
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: b) 产品是以非无菌形式提供且需在灭菌或使用前进行清洁处理；
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第66页共83页
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: Product is supplied non-sterile and is to be subjected to a cleaning process prior to
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: sterilization or its use;
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: c) 产品在灭菌或使用前不能进行清洁处理，使用时其清洁是至关重要的；
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: Product cannot be cleaned prior to sterilization or its use, and its cleanliness is of
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: significance in use;
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: d) 提供的产品为非无菌使用，使用时其清洁是至关重要的；
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: Product is supplied to be used non-sterile, and its cleanliness is of significance in use;
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: e) 在制造过程中从产品中除去过程添加物。
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: Process agents are to be removed from product during manufacture.
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: 若产品是按照上述a）或b）的要求进行清洁，则6.4.1 中包含的要求不适用于
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: 清洁处理前的过程。
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: If product is cleaned in accordance with a) or b) above, the requirements contained
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: in 6.4.1 do not apply prior to the cleaning process.
blocks.section_title: 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

blocks.text: 7.5.3 安装活动（不适用）Installation activities ( Not Applicable)
blocks.section_title: 安装活动（不适用）Installation activities ( Not Applicable)

blocks.text: 7.5.4 服务活动（不适用）Servicing activities( Not Applicable)
blocks.section_title: 服务活动（不适用）Servicing activities( Not Applicable)

blocks.text: 7.5.5 无菌医疗器械的专用要求 Sterile Medical Device Special Requirement
blocks.section_title: 无菌医疗器械的专用要求 Sterile Medical Device Special Requirement

blocks.text: 若产品以无菌形式提供，品质经理负责对每一生产批产品的灭菌过程参数进行记录，
blocks.section_title: 无菌医疗器械的专用要求 Sterile Medical Device Special Requirement

blocks.text: 形成灭菌记录，保持于DCC。
blocks.section_title: 无菌医疗器械的专用要求 Sterile Medical Device Special Requirement

p065_b0021 [7.5.1 | segment_0148]: d) 获得和使用监视和测量设备；
p065_b0022 [7.5.1 | segment_0148]: Availability and use of monitoring and measuring equipment;
p065_b0023 [7.5.1 | segment_0148]: e) 对标记和包装实施规定的操作；
p065_b0024 [7.5.1 | segment_0148]: Implementation of defined operations for labelling and packaging;
p065_b0025 [7.5.1 | segment_0148]: f) 实施产品放行、交付和交付后活动。
p065_b0026 [7.5.1 | segment_0148]: Implementation of product release, delivery and post-delivery activities.
p065_b0028 [7.5.1 | segment_0148]: 公司应保持每一批医疗器械的记录（见4.2.5），提供可追溯到各部件的批号，并标
p065_b0029 [7.5.1 | segment_0148]: 明生产数量和批准销售的数量。每批的记录应由指定人员加以验证和批准。
p065_b0030 [7.5.1 | segment_0148]: Company should establish the necessary processes to maintain records (see 4.2.5) for
p065_b0031 [7.5.1 | segment_0148]: each lot of medical devices that provides traceability to the lot numbers of the
p065_b0032 [7.5.1 | segment_0148]: component parts and identifies the amount manufactured and amount approved for
p065_b0033 [7.5.1 | segment_0148]: distribution. The lot records are verified and approved by designated personnel.

p066_b0011 [7.5.2 | segment_0150]: d) 提供的产品为非无菌使用，使用时其清洁是至关重要的；

生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision
生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: The Group shall maintain records of the sterilization process parameters used for each
blocks.section_title: 无菌医疗器械的专用要求 Sterile Medical Device Special Requirement

blocks.text: sterilization batch (see 4.2.5). Sterilization records shall be traceable to each production
blocks.section_title: 无菌医疗器械的专用要求 Sterile Medical Device Special Requirement

blocks.text: batch of medical devices.
blocks.section_title: 无菌医疗器械的专用要求 Sterile Medical Device Special Requirement

blocks.text: 7.5.6 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: 对特殊的过程实施确认，包括灭菌过程，以证明这些过程实现所策划的结果的能力
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: Validation is performed for special processes, including the sterilization processes, to
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: demonstrate the ability of these processes to achieve planned results.
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: 将过程确认程序形成文件，过程确认包括：
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: The Group shall document procedures for validation of processes, including:
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: a) 为过程的评审和批准所规定的准则﹔
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: Defined criteria for review and approval of the processes, b) 设备鉴定和人员资格的鉴定﹔
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: Approval of equipment and qualification of personnel,
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第67页共83页
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: c) 使用特定方法、程序和接收准则﹔
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: Use of specific methods, procedures and acceptance criteria; d) 适当时包括包含样本量原理的统计技术；
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: As appropriate, statistical techniques with rationale for sample sizes; e) 记录的要求（见4.2.5）； requirement for records (see 4.2.5)； f) 再确认，包括再确认的准则。
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: Revalidation, including criteria for revalidation; g) 对过程更改的批准。
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: Approval of changes to the processes.
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: 集团公司将用于生产提供的计算机软件应用的确认程序形成文件，此类软件的应用
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: 在首次使用前应予以确认，适当时，此类软件或其应用更改后也应予以确认。有关
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: 软件确认和再确认的特定方法和活动应与软件使用有关的风险（包括对产品符合规
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: 范的能力的影响）相适应。
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: 保留确认的结果和结论以及确认所采取的必要措施的记录（见4.2.4 和4.2.5）。
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: The Group shall document procedures for the validation of the application of computer
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: software used in production and service provision. Such software applications shall be
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: validated prior to initial use and, as appropriate, after changes to such software or its
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: application. The specific approach and activities associated with software validation and
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: revalidation shall be proportionate to the risk associated with the use of the software,
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: including the effect on the ability of the product to conform to specifications.
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: Records of the results and conclusion of validation and necessary actions from the
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: validation shall be maintained (see 4.2.4 and 4.2.5).
blocks.section_title: 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

blocks.text: 7.5.7 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求
blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: Particular requirements for validation of processes for sterilization and sterile barrier
blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: systems
blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: 集团公司将灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统的确认程序形成文件（见4.2.4）
blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: The organization shall document procedures (see 4.2.4) for the validation of processes for
blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: sterilization and sterile barrier systems.
blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统应在实施前得到确认，适当时，还应在后续的产品或过程更
blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: 改实施前得到确认。
blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: Processes for sterilization and sterile barrier systems shall be validated prior to
blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: implementation and following product or process changes, as appropriate.
blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第68页共83页
blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: 保留确认的结果和结论以及确认所采取的必要措施的记录（见4.2.4 和4.2.5）
blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: Records of the results and, conclusion of validation and necessary actions from the
blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: validation shall be maintained (see 4.2.4 and 4.2.5).
blocks.section_title: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

blocks.text: 7.5.8 标识Identification
blocks.section_title: 标识Identification

blocks.text: 产品实现的全过程中的产品均依照形成文件的程序使用适宜的方法予以识别
blocks.section_title: 标识Identification

blocks.text: Products are identified by suitable means throughout product realization in accordance with
blocks.section_title: 标识Identification

blocks.text: the documented procedures
blocks.section_title: 标识Identification

p067_b0007 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: Use of specific methods, procedures and acceptance criteria; d) 适当时包括包含样本量原理的统计技术；
p067_b0008 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: As appropriate, statistical techniques with rationale for sample sizes; e) 记录的要求（见4.2.5）； requirement for records (see 4.2.5)； f) 再确认，包括再确认的准则。
p067_b0009 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: Revalidation, including criteria for revalidation; g) 对过程更改的批准。
p067_b0010 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: Approval of changes to the processes.
p067_b0012 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: 集团公司将用于生产提供的计算机软件应用的确认程序形成文件，此类软件的应用
p067_b0013 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: 在首次使用前应予以确认，适当时，此类软件或其应用更改后也应予以确认。有关
p067_b0014 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: 软件确认和再确认的特定方法和活动应与软件使用有关的风险（包括对产品符合规
p067_b0015 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: 范的能力的影响）相适应。
p067_b0016 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: 保留确认的结果和结论以及确认所采取的必要措施的记录（见4.2.4 和4.2.5）。
p067_b0017 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: The Group shall document procedures for the validation of the application of computer
p067_b0018 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: software used in production and service provision. Such software applications shall be
p067_b0019 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: validated prior to initial use and, as appropriate, after changes to such software or its
p067_b0020 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: application. The specific approach and activities associated with software validation and
p067_b0021 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: revalidation shall be proportionate to the risk associated with the use of the software,
p067_b0022 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: including the effect on the ability of the product to conform to specifications.
p067_b0023 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: Records of the results and conclusion of validation and necessary actions from the
p067_b0024 [7.5.6 | segment_0155]: validation shall be maintained (see 4.2.4 and 4.2.5).

p067_b0034 [7.5.7 | segment_0156]: 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统应在实施前得到确认，适当时，还应在后续的产品或过程更

p067_b0036 [7.5.7 | segment_0156]: Processes for sterilization and sterile barrier systems shall be validated prior to
p067_b0037 [7.5.7 | segment_0156]: implementation and following product or process changes, as appropriate.

blocks.section_title: 标识Identification

blocks.text: 的全过程中应保持产品状态的标识，确保只有通过所要求的检验和试验或经授权让步

blocks.text: 放行的产品才能被发送或使用。

blocks.section_title: 标识Identification

blocks.text: authorized concession is dispatched or used.

blocks.text: 7.5.9 可追溯性Traceability
blocks.section_title: 可追溯性Traceability

blocks.text: a) 总则General
blocks.section_title: 可追溯性Traceability

blocks.text: 按照0.4.2 所列的适用法规的要求规定可追溯性的范围、程度以及拟保留的记录
blocks.section_title: 可追溯性Traceability

blocks.text: （见4.2.5），制定相应的程序并形成文件。
blocks.section_title: 可追溯性Traceability

blocks.text: The organization shall document procedures for traceability. These procedures shall
blocks.section_title: 可追溯性Traceability

blocks.text: define the extent of traceability in accordance with applicable regulatory
blocks.section_title: 可追溯性Traceability

blocks.text: requirements(see 0.4.2) and the records to be maintained(see 4.2.5).
