blocks.text: 7.5.10 顾客财产Customer property
blocks.section_title: 顾客财产Customer property

blocks.text: 集团公司维护在公司控制下或使用的客户财产。公司识别、验证、保护和维护供其使用 或构成产品一部分的客户财产。当客户财产发生丢失、损坏或发现不适用的情况时，应 报告客户并保持记录（见4.2.5）。
blocks.section_title: 顾客财产Customer property

blocks.text: The Group exercises care with customer property while it is under the Group’s control or being used by the Group. The Group identifies, verifies, protects and safeguards customer property provided for use or incorporation into the product. If any customer property is lost, damaged or otherwise found to be unsuitable for use, this shall be reported to the customer and records maintained (see 4.2.5).
blocks.section_title: 顾客财产Customer property

blocks.text: 7.5.11 产品防护Preservation of Product
blocks.section_title: 产品防护Preservation of Product

blocks.text: 集团公司应建立为使产品在加工、贮存、处置和流通期间符合要求而提供防护的程序并 形成文件，防护适用于医疗器械的组成部分。
blocks.section_title: 产品防护Preservation of Product

blocks.text: The Group shall document procedures for preserving the conformity of product to requirements during processing, storage, handling, and distribution. Preservation shall apply
blocks.section_title: 产品防护Preservation of Product

blocks.text: to the constituent parts of a medical device.
blocks.section_title: 产品防护Preservation of Product

blocks.text: 在产品的加工、贮存、处置和流通期间，当其暴露于预期条件和危险（源）时，集团公 司应通过以下方式防止产品发现变化、污染或损坏：
blocks.section_title: 产品防护Preservation of Product

blocks.text: The Group shall protect product from alteration, contamination or damage when exposed to expected conditions and hazards during processing, storage, handling, and distribution by: a) 设计和制作适当的包装和货运包装箱；
blocks.section_title: 产品防护Preservation of Product

blocks.text: Designing and constructing suitable packaging and shipping containers; b) 如果包装本身不能提供防护，将所需的特殊条件要求形成文件。
blocks.section_title: 产品防护Preservation of Product

blocks.text: Documenting requirements for special conditions needed if packaging alone cannot provide preservation. 如果要求特殊条件，其应受控并予以记录（见4.2.5）
blocks.section_title: 产品防护Preservation of Product

blocks.text: If special conditions are required, they shall be controlled and recorded (see 4.2.5).
blocks.section_title: 产品防护Preservation of Product

blocks.text: 7.6 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: 生产部和质量部负责确定各自责任范围的需实施的监控和测量以及所需的监控和测量装置，为 产品符合确定的要求提供证据(见7.2.1)。
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: Production and Quality are responsible to determine and establish monitoring and measurement processes to be undertaken in their responsible areas and provide evidence of conformity that products and components conform to specific requirements (see 7.2.1).
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: 集团公司建立了形成文件的程序以确保监控和测量活动可行并以与监控和测量要求相一致的方 式实施。
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: Documented procedures are established to ensure that monitoring and measurement can be carried out and are carried out in a manner that is consistent with the monitoring and measurement
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: requirements. These procedures included instructions for the use of test equipment to verify product conformity and where necessary, verification of the environmental condition necessary to perform testing. 为确保结果有效，必要时，测量设备应：
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: Where necessary to ensure valid results, measuring equipments are: a) 对照能溯源到国际或国家标准的测量标准，按照规定的时间间隔或在使用前进行校准或检定；
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: 当不存在上述标准时，应记录校准或检定的依据（见4.2.5）；
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: Calibrated or verified at specified intervals, or prior to use, against measurement standards traceable to international or national measurement standards; where no such standards exist, the basis used for calibration or verification shall be recorded（see 4.2.5）; b) 进行调整或必要时再调整；应记录这种调整或再调整（见4.2.5）；
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: Be adjusted or re-adjusted as necessary: such adjustments or re-adjustments shall be recorded(see 4.2.5); c) 得到识别，以确定其校准状态；
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: Identified to enable the calibration status to be determined; d) 防止可能使测量结果失效的调整；
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: Safeguarded from adjustments that would invalidate the measurement result; e) 在搬运、维护和贮存期间防止损坏或失效。
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: Protected from damage and deterioration during handling, maintenance and storage. 集团公司应按照形成文件的程序执行校准或鉴定
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: The Group shall perform calibration or verification in accordance with documented procedures.
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: 此外，当发现设备不符合要求时，对以往测量结果的有效性予以评价和记录，并对该设备和任 何受影响的产品采取适当的措施。品质工程师负责测量设备的校准和验证并保持校准和验证结 果的记录（见4.2.5）。
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第72页共83页
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: In addition, the validity of the previous measuring results is assessed and recorded, and appropriate actions are taken on the equipment; and any non-conforming products affected by that equipment. Quality Engineer is responsible for the calibration and verification of measuring equipments and maintaining the records of the results of calibration and verification (see 4.2.5). 集团公司应将用于监视和测量要求的计算机软件应用的确认程序形成文件。此类软件的应用在 首次使用前应予以确认，适当时，此类软件或其应用更改后也应予确认。有关软件确认和再确 认的特定方法和活动应与软件使用有关的风险（包括对产品符合规范的能力的影响）相适应。
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

p071_b0004 [7.5.12 | segment_0165]: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
p071_b0006 [7.6 | segment_0166]: 7.6 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices
p071_b0007 [7.6 | segment_0166]: 生产部和质量部负责确定各自责任范围的需实施的监控和测量以及所需的监控和测量装置，为 产品符合确定的要求提供证据(见7.2.1)。
p071_b0008 [7.6 | segment_0166]: Production and Quality are responsible to determine and establish monitoring and measurement processes to be undertaken in their responsible areas and provide evidence of conformity that products and components conform to specific requirements (see 7.2.1).
p071_b0009 [7.6 | segment_0166]: 集团公司建立了形成文件的程序以确保监控和测量活动可行并以与监控和测量要求相一致的方 式实施。
p071_b0010 [7.6 | segment_0166]: Documented procedures are established to ensure that monitoring and measurement can be carried out and are carried out in a manner that is consistent with the monitoring and measurement
p071_b0011 [7.6 | segment_0166]: requirements. These procedures included instructions for the use of test equipment to verify product conformity and where necessary, verification of the environmental condition necessary to perform testing. 为确保结果有效，必要时，测量设备应：
p071_b0012 [7.6 | segment_0166]: Where necessary to ensure valid results, measuring equipments are: a) 对照能溯源到国际或国家标准的测量标准，按照规定的时间间隔或在使用前进行校准或检定；
p071_b0013 [7.6 | segment_0166]: 当不存在上述标准时，应记录校准或检定的依据（见4.2.5）；
p071_b0014 [7.6 | segment_0166]: Calibrated or verified at specified intervals, or prior to use, against measurement standards traceable to international or national measurement standards; where no such standards exist, the basis used for calibration or verification shall be recorded（see 4.2.5）; b) 进行调整或必要时再调整；应记录这种调整或再调整（见4.2.5）；
p071_b0015 [7.6 | segment_0166]: Be adjusted or re-adjusted as necessary: such adjustments or re-adjustments shall be recorded(see 4.2.5); c) 得到识别，以确定其校准状态；
p071_b0016 [7.6 | segment_0166]: Identified to enable the calibration status to be determined; d) 防止可能使测量结果失效的调整；
p071_b0017 [7.6 | segment_0166]: Safeguarded from adjustments that would invalidate the measurement result; e) 在搬运、维护和贮存期间防止损坏或失效。
p071_b0018 [7.6 | segment_0166]: Protected from damage and deterioration during handling, maintenance and storage. 集团公司应按照形成文件的程序执行校准或鉴定
p071_b0019 [7.6 | segment_0166]: The Group shall perform calibration or verification in accordance with documented procedures.
p071_b0020 [7.6 | segment_0166]: 此外，当发现设备不符合要求时，对以往测量结果的有效性予以评价和记录，并对该设备和任 何受影响的产品采取适当的措施。品质工程师负责测量设备的校准和验证并保持校准和验证结 果的记录（见4.2.5）。
p072_b0003 [7.6 | segment_0167]: 页次Page No.： 第72页共83页
p072_b0004 [7.6 | segment_0167]: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
p072_b0006 [7.6 | segment_0167]: In addition, the validity of the previous measuring results is assessed and recorded, and appropriate actions are taken on the equipment; and any non-conforming products affected by that equipment. Quality Engineer is responsible for the calibration and verification of measuring equipments and maintaining the records of the results of calibration and verification (see 4.2.5). 集团公司应将用于监视和测量要求的计算机软件应用的确认程序形成文件。此类软件的应用在 首次使用前应予以确认，适当时，此类软件或其应用更改后也应予确认。有关软件确认和再确 认的特定方法和活动应与软件使用有关的风险（包括对产品符合规范的能力的影响）相适应。

测量、分析和改进Measurement, analysis and improvement

blocks.text: The Group shall document procedures for the validation of the application of computer software used for the monitoring and measurement of requirements. Such software applications shall be validated prior to initial use and, as appropriate, after changes to such software or its application. The specific approach and activities associated with software validation and revalidation shall be proportionate to the risk associated with the use of the software, including the effect on the ability of the product to
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: conform to specifications. 应保留确认的结果和结论以及确认所采取的必要措施的记录（见4.2.4 和4.2.5）。
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

blocks.text: Records of the results and conclusion of validation and necessary actions from the validation shall be maintained (see 4.2.4 and 4.2.5). 辅助程序Supporting procedures, QSP0716 测量仪器之校准和控制 Calibration & Control of Measuring Instrument

blocks.text: 8.0 测量、分析和改进Measurement, analysis and improvement
blocks.section_title: 测量、分析和改进Measurement, analysis and improvement

blocks.text: 8.1 总则General
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: 监控、测量、分析和改进过程（包括对适用方法、统计技术及其应用程度）均予以策划和实施以
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: The monitoring, measurement, analysis and improvement processes (including determination of applicable methods, statistical techniques and the extent of their use) are planned and implemented to a) 证实产品的符合性﹔
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: demonstrate conformity of the product, b) 确保质量管理体系的符合性，及
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: ensure conformity of the Quality Management System, and c) 持续改进质量管理体系的有效性。
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: continually improve the effectiveness of the Quality Management System.
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第74页共83页
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: 8.2 监控和测量Monitoring and measuring
blocks.section_title: 监控和测量Monitoring and measuring

blocks.text: 8.2.1 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction
blocks.section_title: 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction

blocks.text: 作为对质量管理体系业绩的一种测量，与以下方面相关的信息均予以监控
blocks.section_title: 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction

blocks.text: As one of the measurements of the performance of the Quality Management System, the information relating to the following is monitored a) 是否已满足客户的要求，及/或
blocks.section_title: 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction

blocks.text: whether the Group has met customer requirements, and/or b) 客户对集团公司印象中，集团公司是否已满足其要求
blocks.section_title: 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction

blocks.text: customer perception as to whether the Group has met customer requirements
blocks.section_title: 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction

blocks.text: 获取和利用这种信息的方法，如拜访客户、电话或电邮调查，由市场总监确定。
blocks.section_title: 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction

blocks.text: The methods, such as visiting customers or by phone or e-mail surveys, for obtaining information are determined by the Marketing Director. 集团公司应建立反馈系统的形成文件的程序，该反馈过程应包括从生产和生产后活动中 收集数据的规定。
blocks.section_title: 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction

blocks.text: The Group shall document procedures for the feedback process. This feedback process shall include provisions to gather data from production as well as post-production activities.
blocks.section_title: 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction

blocks.text: 从反馈过程中收集的信息应用作为监视和保持产品要求的风险管理的潜在输入以及产品 实现或改进过程的潜在输入。
blocks.section_title: 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction

blocks.text: The information gathered in the feedback process shall serve as potential input into risk management for monitoring and maintaining the product requirements as well as the product realization or improvement processes.
blocks.section_title: 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction

blocks.text: 对从生产后阶段获取的经验的评审构成反馈系统的一部分。
blocks.section_title: 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction

blocks.text: The review of the experience gained from the post-production phase forms part of the feedback system.
blocks.section_title: 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction

blocks.text: 8.2.2 投诉处置Complaint handling
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: 集团公司应按照0.4.1 所列标准及0.4.2 所列适用的法规要求将及时处置投诉的程序形成 文件。
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: The Group shall document procedures for timely complaint handling in accordance with applicable regulatory requirements (see 0.4.1 and 0.4.2). 这些程序应包括对以下方面的最低要求和职责：
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: These procedures shall include at a minimum requirements and responsibilities for: a) 接收和记录信息；
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: Receiving and recording information;
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第75页共83页
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: b) 评价信息以确定反馈是否构成投诉；
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: Evaluating information to determine if the feedback constitutes a complaint; c) 调查投诉；
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: Investigating complaints; d) 确定是否需要向适当的监管机构报告信息；
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: Determining the need to report the information to the appropriate regulatory authorities; e) 处置与投诉有关的产品；
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: Handling of complaint-related product; f) 确定是否需要启动纠正或纠正措施。
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: Determining the need to initiate corrections or corrective actions. 如果有任何投诉未经调查，应记录理由。应记录由投诉处置过程形成的任何纠正或纠正措 施。
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: If any complaint is not investigated, justification shall be documented. Any correction or corrective action resulting from the complaint handling process shall be documented. 如果一项调查确定是组织外的活动导致了投诉，则应在组织和所涉及的外部方之间交换 相关信息。
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: If an investigation determines activities outside the organization contributed to the complaint, relevant information shall be exchanged between the organization and the external party involved. 应保留投诉处置记录（见4.2.5）
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: Records of reporting to regulatory authorities shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).
blocks.section_title: 投诉处置Complaint handling

blocks.text: 8.2.3 向监管机构报告Reporting to regulatory authorities
blocks.section_title: 向监管机构报告Reporting to regulatory authorities

blocks.text: 如果0.4.2 所列的适用的法规有要求，将符合不良事件报告准则的投诉或发布的忠告性通 知报告，则组织应将向有关的监管机构报告的程序形成文件。
blocks.section_title: 向监管机构报告Reporting to regulatory authorities

blocks.text: If applicable regulatory requirements (see 0.4.2) require notification of complaints that meet specified reporting criteria of adverse events or issuance of advisory notices, the organization shall document procedures for providing notification to the appropriate regulatory authorities. 应保留向监管机构报告的记录（见4.2.5）
blocks.section_title: 向监管机构报告Reporting to regulatory authorities

blocks.text: Records of reporting to regulatory authorities shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).
blocks.section_title: 向监管机构报告Reporting to regulatory authorities

blocks.text: 8.2.4 内部审核Internal audit
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: 按计划的时间间隔进行内部审核以确定质量管理体系是否：
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: Internal audits are conducted at planned intervals to determine whether the Quality Management System:
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第76页共83页
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: a) 符合策划并形成文件的安排、0.4.1 所列标准的要求、0.4.2 所列适用法规的要求及本质
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: 量手册所描述的质量管理体系要求；
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: Comply with plan and produce documents which fulfill the specifications stated in section 0.4.1, regulations stated in section 0.4.2 and the quality management system requirement mentioned in this quality manual b) 得到有效地实施和保持。
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: Is effectively implemented and maintained. 策划了一个审核方案，考虑拟审核的过程和区域的状况和重要性，以及以往审核的结果。 审核准则以0.4.1 所列的标准为基础。根据内部审核程序，本手册所描述的整个质量管理 体系应至少每年审核2 次。审核员的选择和审核的实施，审核过程的客观性和公证性均得 到确保。审核员不得审核自己的工作。
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: An audit program is planned, taking into consideration of the status and importance of the
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: processes and areas to be audited, as well as the results of previous audits. The audit criteria are based on the specifications listed in section 0.4.1. The whole Quality Management System described in this Quality Manual is audited at least twice a year according to the internal quality procedure. Selection of auditors and conduct of audits are such that objectivity and impartiality of the audit process are ensured. Auditors are not allowed to audit their own work. 审核包括评估：
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: Audits include the evaluation of:
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: a) 活动、过程和工作区域
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: Activities, processes, and work areas. b) 质量实践，体系程序和工作指引
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: Quality practices, system procedures and work instructions c) 证明文件及记录等
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: Certification documents and records, etc. 部门负责人确保及时采取措施以消除在各自负责区域所发现的不合格及其原因。
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: Department heads are responsible to ensure that actions are taken without undue delay to eliminate the nonconformities identified in their responsible areas and their causes 管理者代表应对所采取措施的验证及验证结果的报告。(见8.5.2)
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: The Management Representative is responsible for the verification of the actions taken and the reporting of verification results (see 8.5.2).
blocks.section_title: 内部审核Internal audit

blocks.text: 8.2.5 过程的监控和测量Monitoring and measurement of processes
blocks.section_title: 过程的监控和测量Monitoring and measurement of processes

blocks.text: 采用适宜的方法对质量管理体系过程进行监控，并在适当时进行测量。这些方法应证实过 程实现所策划的结果的能力。当未能达到所策划的结果时，应采取适当的纠正和纠正措施， 以确保产品的符合性。
blocks.section_title: 过程的监控和测量Monitoring and measurement of processes

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第77页共83页
blocks.section_title: 过程的监控和测量Monitoring and measurement of processes

blocks.text: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
blocks.section_title: 过程的监控和测量Monitoring and measurement of processes

blocks.text: Suitable methods are applied for monitoring and, where applicable, measurement of the Quality Management System processes. These methods demonstrate the ability of the processes to achieve planned results. When planned results are not achieved, appropriate correction and corrective action are taken, to ensure conformity of the product.
blocks.section_title: 过程的监控和测量Monitoring and measurement of processes

blocks.text: 8.2.6 产品的监视和测量Monitoring and measurement of product
blocks.section_title: 产品的监视和测量Monitoring and measurement of product

blocks.text: 在产品实现过程的适当阶段，根据所策划的安排和形成文件的程序对产品的特性予以监 控和测量以验证产品要求已得到满足。这种监视和测量应依据策划并形成文件的安排和 形成文件的程序，在产品实现过程的适当阶段进行。
blocks.section_title: 产品的监视和测量Monitoring and measurement of product

blocks.text: The Group shall monitor and measure the characteristics of the product to verify that product
blocks.section_title: 产品的监视和测量Monitoring and measurement of product

blocks.text: requirements have been met. This shall be carried out at applicable stages of the product realization process in accordance with the planned and documented arrangements and documented procedures. 保持符合接收准则的证据。对有权放行产品的人员予以记录（见4.2.5）。适当时，记录 应识别用于执行测量活动的检测设备
blocks.section_title: 产品的监视和测量Monitoring and measurement of product

不合格品控制Control of nonconforming product

blocks.text: Evidence of conformity to the acceptance criteria shall be maintained. The identity of the person authorizing release of product shall be recorded (see 4.2.5). As appropriate, records shall identify the test equipment used to perform measurement activities. 只有在策划的安排已圆满完成时，才能放行产品。如果，万一货期紧急，必须得到客户的 批准才能在测试完成之前放行产品并且测试必须在产品使用之前完成。
blocks.section_title: 产品的监视和测量Monitoring and measurement of product

blocks.text: Product release and service delivery shall not proceed until the planned and documented arrangements have been satisfactorily completed. If, in case of urgent delivery, products are shipped before completion of testing, it must be approved by the customer and test must be completed before the products are used.
blocks.section_title: 产品的监视和测量Monitoring and measurement of product

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第78页共83页

blocks.text: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
blocks.section_title: 辅助程序Supporting Procedures

blocks.text: 8.3 不合格品控制Control of nonconforming product
blocks.section_title: 不合格品控制Control of nonconforming product

blocks.text: 8.3.1 总则General
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: 对不符合产品要求的产品予以识别和控制以防止非预期的使用或交付。不合格产品应放
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: 置在隔离区直到不符合项得以解决。不合格产品的控制及与不合格品识别、记录、隔
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: 离、评价和处置相关职责和权限应于文件化程序中规定。不合格的评价应包括确定是否
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: 需要调查和通知对不合格负责的所有外部方。
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: The Group shall ensure that product which does not conform to product requirements
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: identified and controlled to prevent its unintended use or delivery. The organization shall
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: document a procedure to define the controls and related responsibilities and authorities for
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: the identification, documentation, segregation, evaluation and disposition of nonconforming
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: product.
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: 应保留不合格的性质以及随后所采取的任何措施的记录，包括评价、任何调查和决策的
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: 理由说明（见4.2.5）
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: Nonconforming product shall be reserved and record implemented follow-up action including
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: evaluation, investigation and decision making reason.
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: 8.3.2 交付前发现不合格品的响应措施
blocks.section_title: 交付前发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: Actions in response to nonconforming product detected before delivery
blocks.section_title: 交付前发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: 集团公司应通过下列一种或几种途径处置不合格品：
blocks.section_title: 交付前发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: The Group shall deal with nonconforming product by one or more of the following ways:
blocks.section_title: 交付前发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: a) 采取措施以消除已发现的不合格；
blocks.section_title: 交付前发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: Taking action to eliminate the detected nonconformity; b) 采取措施以防止其原预期的使用或应用；
blocks.section_title: 交付前发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: Taking action to preclude its original intended use or application; c) 授权让步使用、放行或接收。
blocks.section_title: 交付前发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: Authorizing its use, release or acceptance under concession. 应确保不合格品仅在提供理由、获得批准和满足适用法规要求的情况下才能让步接收。应 保留让步接收和授权让步人员身份的记录（见4.2.5）
blocks.section_title: 交付前发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: The Group shall ensure that nonconforming product is accepted by concession only if the justification is provided, approval is obtained and applicable regulatory requirements are met. Records of the acceptance by concession and the identity of the person authorizing the concession shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).
blocks.section_title: 交付前发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: 8.3.3 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: 页次Page No.： 第79页共83页
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: Actions in response to nonconforming product detected after delivery
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: 当交付后或开始使用后发现不合格品时，组织应采取与不合格的影响或潜在影响的程度
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: 相适应的措施。应保留所采取措施的记录（见4.2.5）
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: When nonconforming product is detected after delivery or use has started, the organization
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: shall take action appropriate to the effects, or potential effects, of the nonconformity. Records
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: of actions taken shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: 按照0.4.1 所列标准和0.4.2 所列适用的法规要求将忠告性通知的发布程序形成文件。这
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: 些程序应能随时付诸实施。保留与发布忠告性通知相关的措施的记录（见4.2.5）
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

As appropriate, records shall identify the test equipment used to perform measurement activities. 只有在策划的安排已圆满完成时，才能放行产品。如果，万一货期紧急，必须得到客户的 批准才能在测试完成之前放行产品并且测试必须在产品使用之前完成。
p077_b0013 [8.2.6 | segment_0181]: Product release and service delivery shall not proceed until the planned and documented arrangements have been satisfactorily completed. If, in case of urgent delivery, products are shipped before completion of testing, it must be approved by the customer and test must be completed before the products are used.

p077_b0015 [8.2.6 | segment_0181]: Particular requirement for active implantable devices and implantable device(Not
p077_b0016 [8.2.6 | segment_0181]: Applicable)

p078_b0004 [8.2.7 | segment_0183]: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
p078_b0006 [8.3 | segment_0184]: 8.3 不合格品控制Control of nonconforming product
p078_b0008 [8.3.1 | segment_0185]: 8.3.1 总则General
p078_b0009 [8.3.1 | segment_0185]: 对不符合产品要求的产品予以识别和控制以防止非预期的使用或交付。不合格产品应放
p078_b0010 [8.3.1 | segment_0185]: 置在隔离区直到不符合项得以解决。不合格产品的控制及与不合格品识别、记录、隔
p078_b0011 [8.3.1 | segment_0185]: 离、评价和处置相关职责和权限应于文件化程序中规定。不合格的评价应包括确定是否
p078_b0012 [8.3.1 | segment_0185]: 需要调查和通知对不合格负责的所有外部方。
p078_b0013 [8.3.1 | segment_0185]: The Group shall ensure that product which does not conform to product requirements
p078_b0014 [8.3.1 | segment_0185]: identified and controlled to prevent its unintended use or delivery. The organization shall
p078_b0015 [8.3.1 | segment_0185]: document a procedure to define the controls and related responsibilities and authorities for
p078_b0016 [8.3.1 | segment_0185]: the identification, documentation, segregation, evaluation and disposition of nonconforming
p078_b0017 [8.3.1 | segment_0185]: product.
p078_b0019 [8.3.1 | segment_0185]: 应保留不合格的性质以及随后所采取的任何措施的记录，包括评价、任何调查和决策的
p078_b0020 [8.3.1 | segment_0185]: 理由说明（见4.2.5）
p078_b0021 [8.3.1 | segment_0185]: Nonconforming product shall be reserved and record implemented follow-up action including
p078_b0022 [8.3.1 | segment_0185]: evaluation, investigation and decision making reason.
p078_b0024 [8.3.2 | segment_0186]: 8.3.2 交付前发现不合格品的响应措施
p078_b0025 [8.3.2 | segment_0186]: Actions in response to nonconforming product detected before delivery
p078_b0026 [8.3.2 | segment_0186]: 集团公司应通过下列一种或几种途径处置不合格品：
p078_b0027 [8.3.2 | segment_0186]: The Group shall deal with nonconforming product by one or more of the following ways:
p078_b0028 [8.3.2 | segment_0186]: a) 采取措施以消除已发现的不合格；
p078_b0029 [8.3.2 | segment_0186]: Taking action to eliminate the detected nonconformity; b) 采取措施以防止其原预期的使用或应用；
p078_b0030 [8.3.2 | segment_0186]: Taking action to preclude its original intended use or application; c) 授权让步使用、放行或接收。
p078_b0031 [8.3.2 | segment_0186]: Authorizing its use, release or acceptance under concession. 应确保不合格品仅在提供理由、获得批准和满足适用法规要求的情况下才能让步接收。应 保留让步接收和授权让步人员身份的记录（见4.2.5）
p078_b0032 [8.3.2 | segment_0186]: The Group shall ensure that nonconforming product is accepted by concession only if the justification is provided, approval is obtained and applicable regulatory requirements are met. Records of the acceptance by concession and the identity of the person authorizing the concession shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).
p078_b0034 [8.3.3 | segment_0187]: 8.3.3 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施
p079_b0003 [8.3.3 | segment_0188]: 页次Page No.： 第79页共83页
p079_b0004 [8.3.3 | segment_0188]: 文 件 名 称 Document Name: 质 量 手 册 Quality Manual
p079_b0006 [8.3.3 | segment_0188]: Actions in response to nonconforming product detected after delivery
p079_b0007 [8.3.3 | segment_0188]: 当交付后或开始使用后发现不合格品时，组织应采取与不合格的影响或潜在影响的程度
p079_b0008 [8.3.3 | segment_0188]: 相适应的措施。应保留所采取措施的记录（见4.2.5）
p079_b0009 [8.3.3 | segment_0188]: When nonconforming product is detected after delivery or use has started, the organization
p079_b0010 [8.3.3 | segment_0188]: shall take action appropriate to the effects, or potential effects, of the nonconformity. Records
p079_b0011 [8.3.3 | segment_0188]: of actions taken shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).
p079_b0013 [8.3.3 | segment_0188]: 按照0.4.1 所列标准和0.4.2 所列适用的法规要求将忠告性通知的发布程序形成文件。这
p079_b0014 [8.3.3 | segment_0188]: 些程序应能随时付诸实施。保留与发布忠告性通知相关的措施的记录（见4.2.5）

segments.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: The Group shall document procedures for issuing advisory notices in accordance with
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: applicable regulatory requirements(see 0.4.1 and 0.4.2). These procedures shall be capable of
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: being put into effect at any time. Records of actions relating to the issuance of advisory
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: notices shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).
blocks.section_title: 交付后发现不合格品的响应措施

blocks.text: 8.3.4 返工 Rework
blocks.section_title: 返工 Rework

blocks.text: 集团公司应按照考虑了返工对产品的潜在不良影响所形成文件的程序进行返工。这些程
blocks.section_title: 返工 Rework

blocks.text: 序应经过与原程序相同的评审和批准。
blocks.section_title: 返工 Rework

blocks.text: The Group shall perform rework in accordance with documented procedures that takes into
blocks.section_title: 返工 Rework

blocks.text: account the potential adverse effect of the rework on the product. These procedures shall
blocks.section_title: 返工 Rework

blocks.text: undergo the same review and approval as the original procedure.
blocks.section_title: 返工 Rework

blocks.text: 返工完成后，产品应经验证以确保其满足适用的接收准则和法规要求。
blocks.section_title: 返工 Rework

blocks.text: After the completion of rework, product shall be verified to ensure that it meets applicable
blocks.section_title: 返工 Rework

blocks.text: acceptance criteria and regulatory requirements.
blocks.section_title: 返工 Rework

blocks.text: 应保留返工的记录（见4.2.5）
blocks.section_title: 返工 Rework

blocks.text: Records of rework shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).
blocks.section_title: 返工 Rework

blocks.section_title: 辅助程序Supporting Procedures

blocks.text: 8.4 数据分析Analysis of data
blocks.section_title: 数据分析Analysis of data

blocks.text: 集团公司应将确定、收集和分析适当数据的程序形成文件以证实质量管理体系的适应性、充分 性和有效性。这些程序应包括对统计技术在内的适当方法及其适用程度的确定。
blocks.section_title: 数据分析Analysis of data

blocks.text: The Group shall document procedures to determine, collect and analyse appropriate data to demonstrate the suitability, adequacy and effectiveness of the quality management system. The procedures shall include determination of appropriate methods, including statistical techniques and the extent of their use. 数据分析应包括来自监视和测量的结果以及其他有关来源的数据，并至少包括以下方面输入：
blocks.section_title: 数据分析Analysis of data

blocks.text: The analysis of data shall include data generated as a result of monitoring and measurement and from other relevant sources and include, at a minimum, input from: a) 反馈；
blocks.section_title: 数据分析Analysis of data

blocks.text: Feedback； b) 产品要求的符合性；
blocks.section_title: 数据分析Analysis of data

blocks.text: conformity to product requirements; c) 过程和产品的特性及趋势，包括改进的机会；
blocks.section_title: 数据分析Analysis of data

blocks.text: Characteristics and trends of processes and product, including opportunities for improvement; d) 供方；
blocks.section_title: 数据分析Analysis of data

blocks.text: Suppliers; e) 审核；
blocks.section_title: 数据分析Analysis of data

blocks.text: Audits; f) 适当时，服务报告
blocks.section_title: 数据分析Analysis of data

blocks.text: Service reports, as appropriate. 如果数据分析表明质量管理体系不是适宜的、充分的或有效的，组织应按照8.5 的要求将此分 析结果用作改进的输入。
blocks.section_title: 数据分析Analysis of data

blocks.text: If the analysis of data shows that the quality management system is not suitable, adequate or effective, the organization shall use this analysis as input for improvement as required in 8.5. 数据分析结果的记录应予保持（见4.2.5）。
blocks.section_title: 数据分析Analysis of data

blocks.text: Records of the results of the analysis are maintained (see 4.2.5).
blocks.section_title: 数据分析Analysis of data

blocks.text: 8.5 改进Improvement
blocks.section_title: 改进Improvement

blocks.text: 8.5.1 总则General
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: 确保质量管理体系的持续适宜性、充分性和有效性以及医疗器械的安全和性能，应利用 质量方针、质量目标、审核结果、上市后监督、数据分析、纠正措施、预防措施和管理 评审来识别和实施任何必要的更改。
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: The Group shall identify and implement any changes necessary to ensure and maintain the continued suitability, adequacy and effectiveness of the quality management system as well as medical device safety and performance through the use of the quality policy, quality objectives, audit results, post market surveillance, analysis of data, corrective actions, preventive actions and management review.
blocks.section_title: 总则General

blocks.text: 8.5.2 纠正措施Corrective action
blocks.section_title: 纠正措施Corrective action

blocks.text: 采取适宜的纠正措施以消除不合格的原因，防止不合格项发生。不合格由以下途径提 出：内审、外审、不合格报告、客户投诉，后期项目评审等，纠正措施应无不当拖延。 纠正措施应与不合格的影响程度相适应。
blocks.section_title: 纠正措施Corrective action

blocks.text: Appropriate corrective actions are taken to eliminate the causes of nonconformities in order to prevent recurrence. Non-conformances are raised in the following areas: internal audits, external audits, non-conformance reports, customer complaints, post project reviews and etc. Corrective actions shall not have inappropriate delay and shall be conducted in accordance with the severity of nonconformities. 集团公司建立形成文件的程序以规定以下方面的要求
blocks.section_title: 纠正措施Corrective action

p081_b0007 [8.5.1 | segment_0195]: 8.5.1 总则General

nearby_heading_context: 8.5.2 纠正措施Corrective action

blocks.text: A documented procedure is established to define requirements for a) 评审不合格（包括投诉）；
blocks.section_title: 纠正措施Corrective action

blocks.text: Reviewing nonconformities (including complaints), b) 确定不合格的原因；
blocks.section_title: 纠正措施Corrective action

blocks.text: Determining the causes of nonconformities, c) 评估和确保不合格不再发生的措施的需求；
blocks.section_title: 纠正措施Corrective action

blocks.text: Evaluating the need for action to ensure that nonconformities do not recur, d) 对所需的措施进行策划、形成文件并实施，适当时，包括更新文件；
blocks.section_title: 纠正措施Corrective action

blocks.text: Planning and documenting action needed and implementing such action, including, as appropriate, updating documentation; e) 验证纠正措施对满足适用的法规要求的能力和对医疗器械的安全和性能无不良影响；
blocks.section_title: 纠正措施Corrective action

blocks.text: 及
blocks.section_title: 纠正措施Corrective action

blocks.text: Verifying that the corrective action does not adversely affect the ability to meet applicable regulatory requirements or the safety and performance of the medical device; and f) 评审所采取的纠正措施的有效性。
blocks.section_title: 纠正措施Corrective action

blocks.text: Reviewing the effectiveness of corrective action taken.
blocks.section_title: 纠正措施Corrective action

blocks.section_title: 纠正措施Corrective action

blocks.text: 应保留任何调查的结果和所采取措施的记录（见4.2.5）。
blocks.section_title: 纠正措施Corrective action

blocks.text: Records of the results of any investigation and of action taken shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).
blocks.section_title: 纠正措施Corrective action

blocks.text: 8.5.3 预防措施Preventive action
blocks.section_title: 预防措施Preventive action

blocks.text: 采取适宜的预防措施消除潜在不合格的原因，防止不合格发生。原因来源对内审、外审、 不合格报告、客户反馈等的评审。
blocks.section_title: 预防措施Preventive action

blocks.text: Appropriate preventive actions are taken to eliminate the causes of any potential nonconformity, in order to prevent their occurrence. Their causes are from the reviews of internal audits, external audits, non-conformance reports, customer feedback, etc. 集团公司建立形成文件的程序以规定以下方面的要求：
blocks.section_title: 预防措施Preventive action

blocks.text: A documented procedure is established to define requirements for a) 确定潜在不合格及其原因；
blocks.section_title: 预防措施Preventive action

blocks.text: Determining potential nonconformities and their causes; b) 评估和防止不合格发生的措施的需求；
blocks.section_title: 预防措施Preventive action

blocks.text: Evaluating the need for action to prevent occurrence of nonconformities; c) 对所需的措施进行策划、形成文件并实施，适当时，包括更新文件；
blocks.section_title: 预防措施Preventive action

blocks.text: Planning and documenting action needed and implementing such action, including, as appropriate, updating documentation; d) 验证纠正措施对满足适用的法规要求的能力和对医疗器械的安全和性能无不良影响；
blocks.section_title: 预防措施Preventive action

blocks.text: Verifying that the action does not adversely affect the ability to meet applicable regulatory requirements or the safety and performance of the medical device; e) 适当时，评审所采取的预防措施的有效性。
blocks.section_title: 预防措施Preventive action

blocks.text: Reviewing the effectiveness of the preventive action taken, as appropriate.
blocks.section_title: 预防措施Preventive action

blocks.text: 应保留任何调查的结果和所采取措施的记录（见4.2.5）
blocks.section_title: 预防措施Preventive action

blocks.text: Records of the results of any investigations and of action taken shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).

p081_b0013 [8.5.2 | segment_0196]: A documented procedure is established to define requirements for a) 评审不合格（包括投诉）；
p081_b0014 [8.5.2 | segment_0196]: Reviewing nonconformities (including complaints), b) 确定不合格的原因；
p081_b0015 [8.5.2 | segment_0196]: Determining the causes of nonconformities, c) 评估和确保不合格不再发生的措施的需求；
p081_b0016 [8.5.2 | segment_0196]: Evaluating the need for action to ensure that nonconformities do not recur, d) 对所需的措施进行策划、形成文件并实施，适当时，包括更新文件；
p081_b0017 [8.5.2 | segment_0196]: Planning and documenting action needed and implementing such action, including, as appropriate, updating documentation; e) 验证纠正措施对满足适用的法规要求的能力和对医疗器械的安全和性能无不良影响；
p081_b0018 [8.5.2 | segment_0196]: 及
p081_b0019 [8.5.2 | segment_0196]: Verifying that the corrective action does not adversely affect the ability to meet applicable regulatory requirements or the safety and performance of the medical device; and f) 评审所采取的纠正措施的有效性。
p081_b0020 [8.5.2 | segment_0196]: Reviewing the effectiveness of corrective action taken.

p082_b0007 [8.5.2 | segment_0197]: Records of the results of any investigation and of action taken shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).
p082_b0008 [8.5.3 | segment_0198]: 8.5.3 预防措施Preventive action
p082_b0009 [8.5.3 | segment_0198]: 采取适宜的预防措施消除潜在不合格的原因，防止不合格发生。原因来源对内审、外审、 不合格报告、客户反馈等的评审。
p082_b0010 [8.5.3 | segment_0198]: Appropriate preventive actions are taken to eliminate the causes of any potential nonconformity, in order to prevent their occurrence. Their causes are from the reviews of internal audits, external audits, non-conformance reports, customer feedback, etc. 集团公司建立形成文件的程序以规定以下方面的要求：
p082_b0011 [8.5.3 | segment_0198]: A documented procedure is established to define requirements for a) 确定潜在不合格及其原因；
p082_b0012 [8.5.3 | segment_0198]: Determining potential nonconformities and their causes; b) 评估和防止不合格发生的措施的需求；
p082_b0013 [8.5.3 | segment_0198]: Evaluating the need for action to prevent occurrence of nonconformities; c) 对所需的措施进行策划、形成文件并实施，适当时，包括更新文件；
p082_b0014 [8.5.3 | segment_0198]: Planning and documenting action needed and implementing such action, including, as appropriate, updating documentation; d) 验证纠正措施对满足适用的法规要求的能力和对医疗器械的安全和性能无不良影响；
p082_b0015 [8.5.3 | segment_0198]: Verifying that the action does not adversely affect the ability to meet applicable regulatory requirements or the safety and performance of the medical device; e) 适当时，评审所采取的预防措施的有效性。
p082_b0016 [8.5.3 | segment_0198]: Reviewing the effectiveness of the preventive action taken, as appropriate.
p082_b0017 [8.5.3 | segment_0198]: 应保留任何调查的结果和所采取措施的记录（见4.2.5）
p082_b0018 [8.5.3 | segment_0198]: Records of the results of any investigations and of action taken shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).
